<pre class="fs_0.875em lh_1.7142857 mt_1.7142857em mb_1.7142857em bdr_0.375rem p_4 color-scheme_dark [&amp;_code]:bg-c_transparent [&amp;_code]:bd-w_0 [&amp;_code]:bdr_0 [&amp;_code]:p_0 [&amp;_code]:fw_inherit [&amp;_code]:c_inherit [&amp;_code]:fs_inherit [&amp;_code]:ff_inherit [&amp;_code]:lh_inherit shiki github-dark-default" style="background-color:#0d1117;color:#e6edf3" tabindex="0"><code class="c_var(--colors-prose-code) fw_600 bd-w_1px fs_0.875em p_0.125em_0.25em bdr_0.25em bg-c_gray.a2"><span class="line"><span style="color:#E6EDF3">&lt;</span><span style="color:#7EE787">Menu.Root</span><span style="color:#E6EDF3">&gt;</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E6EDF3">  &lt;</span><span style="color:#7EE787">Menu.Trigger</span><span style="color:#E6EDF3">&gt;</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E6EDF3">    &lt;</span><span style="color:#7EE787">Menu.Indicator</span><span style="color:#E6EDF3"> /&gt;</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E6EDF3">  &lt;/</span><span style="color:#7EE787">Menu.Trigger</span><span style="color:#E6EDF3">&gt;</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E6EDF3">  &lt;</span><span style="color:#7EE787">Menu.Positioner</span><span style="color:#E6EDF3">&gt;</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E6EDF3">    &lt;</span><span style="color:#7EE787">Menu.Content</span><span style="color:#E6EDF3">&gt;</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E6EDF3">      &lt;</span><span style="color:#7EE787">Menu.Arrow</span><span style="color:#E6EDF3">&gt;</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E6EDF3">        &lt;</span><span style="color:#7EE787">Menu.ArrowTip</span><span style="color:#E6EDF3"> /&gt;</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E6EDF3">      &lt;/</span><span style="color:#7EE787">Menu.Arrow</span><span style="color:#E6EDF3">&gt;</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E6EDF3">      &lt;</span><span style="color:#7EE787">Menu.Item</span><span style="color:#E6EDF3"> /&gt;</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E6EDF3">      &lt;</span><span style="color:#7EE787">Menu.ItemGroup</span><span style="color:#E6EDF3">&gt;</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E6EDF3">        &lt;</span><span style="color:#7EE787">Menu.ItemGroupLabel</span><span style="color:#E6EDF3"> /&gt;</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E6EDF3">        &lt;</span><span style="color:#7EE787">Menu.Item</span><span style="color:#E6EDF3"> /&gt;</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E6EDF3">      &lt;/</span><span style="color:#7EE787">Menu.ItemGroup</span><span style="color:#E6EDF3">&gt;</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E6EDF3">      &lt;</span><span style="color:#7EE787">Menu.Separator</span><span style="color:#E6EDF3"> /&gt;</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E6EDF3">    &lt;/</span><span style="color:#7EE787">Menu.Content</span><span style="color:#E6EDF3">&gt;</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E6EDF3">  &lt;/</span><span style="color:#7EE787">Menu.Positioner</span><span style="color:#E6EDF3">&gt;</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E6EDF3">&lt;/</span><span style="color:#7EE787">Menu.Root</span><span style="color:#E6EDF3">&gt;</span></span></code></pre>
<h2 id="examples" class="fs_1.5em mt_2em mb_1em lh_1.3333333 fw_700 c_var(--colors-prose-heading) [&amp;_strong]:fw_800 [&amp;_strong]:c_inherit [&amp;_code]:fs_0.875em [&amp;_+_*]:mt_0"><a class="link subheading-anchor" aria-label="Link to section" href="#examples"><span class="icon icon-link"></span></a>Examples</h2>
<div class="d_flex flex-d_column gap_0 not-prose [&amp;_&gt;_.example-preview-scope]:bdr-b_0"><div class="d_flex min-h_32 md:min-h_48 bg_bg.default bdr_lg bd-w_1px w_full ov_hidden not-prose example-preview-scope"><div class="d_flex flex-d_column ai_center jc_center flex_1 p_4 md:p_6 w_full"><div class="example-spinner" role="status" aria-label="Loading example"></div></div></div><div data-scope="collapsible" data-part="root" data-state="closed" dir="ltr" id="collapsible:_R_8bhanpfn5tlb_"><button class="button button--variant_outline button--size_xs bd-c_inherit c_fg.default w_full bdr-t_0 bd-t-w_0 bg_bg.default c_fg.muted fw_medium fs_xs gap_1.5 hover:bg_gray.2 hover:c_fg.default" data-scope="collapsible" data-part="trigger" id="collapsible:_R_8bhanpfn5tlb_:trigger" dir="ltr" type="button" data-state="closed" aria-controls="collapsible:_R_8bhanpfn5tlb_:content" aria-expanded="false"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-code icon icon--size_sm" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m16 18 6-6-6-6"></path><path d="m8 6-6 6 6 6"></path></svg>Show Code</button></div></div>
<h3 id="item-selection" class="fs_1.25em lh_1.6 mt_1.6em mb_0.6em fw_600 c_var(--colors-prose-heading) [&amp;_strong]:fw_700 [&amp;_strong]:c_inherit [&amp;_code]:fs_0.9em [&amp;_+_*]:mt_0"><a class="link subheading-anchor" aria-label="Link to section" href="#item-selection"><span class="icon icon-link"></span></a>Item Selection</h3>
<p class="mt_1.25em mb_1.25em c_var(--colors-prose-body) [&amp;_a]:td_underline [&amp;_a]:fw_500">Use <code class="c_var(--colors-prose-code) fw_600 bd-w_1px fs_0.875em p_0.125em_0.25em bdr_0.25em bg-c_gray.a2">onSelect</code> to handle item selection. The callback receives the item&#x27;s <code class="c_var(--colors-prose-code) fw_600 bd-w_1px fs_0.875em p_0.125em_0.25em bdr_0.25em bg-c_gray.a2">id</code>.</p>
<div class="d_flex flex-d_column gap_0 not-prose [&amp;_&gt;_.example-preview-scope]:bdr-b_0"><div class="d_flex min-h_32 md:min-h_48 bg_bg.default bdr_lg bd-w_1px w_full ov_hidden not-prose example-preview-scope"><div class="d_flex flex-d_column ai_center jc_center flex_1 p_4 md:p_6 w_full"><div class="example-spinner" role="status" aria-label="Loading example"></div></div></div><div data-scope="collapsible" data-part="root" data-state="closed" dir="ltr" id="collapsible:_R_8hhanpfn5tlb_"><button class="button button--variant_outline button--size_xs bd-c_inherit c_fg.default w_full bdr-t_0 bd-t-w_0 bg_bg.default c_fg.muted fw_medium fs_xs gap_1.5 hover:bg_gray.2 hover:c_fg.default" data-scope="collapsible" data-part="trigger" id="collapsible:_R_8hhanpfn5tlb_:trigger" dir="ltr" type="button" data-state="closed" aria-controls="collapsible:_R_8hhanpfn5tlb_:content" aria-expanded="false"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-code icon icon--size_sm" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m16 18 6-6-6-6"></path><path d="m8 6-6 6 6 6"></path></svg>Show Code</button></div></div>
<h3 id="root-provider" class="fs_1.25em lh_1.6 mt_1.6em mb_0.6em fw_600 c_var(--colors-prose-heading) [&amp;_strong]:fw_700 [&amp;_strong]:c_inherit [&amp;_code]:fs_0.9em [&amp;_+_*]:mt_0"><a class="link subheading-anchor" aria-label="Link to section" href="#root-provider"><span class="icon icon-link"></span></a>Root Provider</h3>
<p class="mt_1.25em mb_1.25em c_var(--colors-prose-body) [&amp;_a]:td_underline [&amp;_a]:fw_500">An alternative way to control the menu is to use the <code class="c_var(--colors-prose-code) fw_600 bd-w_1px fs_0.875em p_0.125em_0.25em bdr_0.25em bg-c_gray.a2">RootProvider</code> component and the <code class="c_var(--colors-prose-code) fw_600 bd-w_1px fs_0.875em p_0.125em_0.25em bdr_0.25em bg-c_gray.a2">useMenu</code> hook. This way you can
access the state and methods from outside the component.</p>
<div class="d_flex flex-d_column gap_0 not-prose [&amp;_&gt;_.example-preview-scope]:bdr-b_0"><div class="d_flex min-h_32 md:min-h_48 bg_bg.default bdr_lg bd-w_1px w_full ov_hidden not-prose example-preview-scope"><div class="d_flex flex-d_column ai_center jc_center flex_1 p_4 md:p_6 w_full"><div class="example-spinner" role="status" aria-label="Loading example"></div></div></div><div data-scope="collapsible" data-part="root" data-state="closed" dir="ltr" id="collapsible:_R_8nhanpfn5tlb_"><button class="button button--variant_outline button--size_xs bd-c_inherit c_fg.default w_full bdr-t_0 bd-t-w_0 bg_bg.default c_fg.muted fw_medium fs_xs gap_1.5 hover:bg_gray.2 hover:c_fg.default" data-scope="collapsible" data-part="trigger" id="collapsible:_R_8nhanpfn5tlb_:trigger" dir="ltr" type="button" data-state="closed" aria-controls="collapsible:_R_8nhanpfn5tlb_:content" aria-expanded="false"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-code icon icon--size_sm" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m16 18 6-6-6-6"></path><path d="m8 6-6 6 6 6"></path></svg>Show Code</button></div></div>
<h3 id="grouping" class="fs_1.25em lh_1.6 mt_1.6em mb_0.6em fw_600 c_var(--colors-prose-heading) [&amp;_strong]:fw_700 [&amp;_strong]:c_inherit [&amp;_code]:fs_0.9em [&amp;_+_*]:mt_0"><a class="link subheading-anchor" aria-label="Link to section" href="#grouping"><span class="icon icon-link"></span></a>Grouping</h3>
<p class="mt_1.25em mb_1.25em c_var(--colors-prose-body) [&amp;_a]:td_underline [&amp;_a]:fw_500">Use <code class="c_var(--colors-prose-code) fw_600 bd-w_1px fs_0.875em p_0.125em_0.25em bdr_0.25em bg-c_gray.a2">Menu.ItemGroup</code> and <code class="c_var(--colors-prose-code) fw_600 bd-w_1px fs_0.875em p_0.125em_0.25em bdr_0.25em bg-c_gray.a2">Menu.ItemGroupLabel</code> to organize related menu items.</p>
<div class="d_flex flex-d_column gap_0 not-prose [&amp;_&gt;_.example-preview-scope]:bdr-b_0"><div class="d_flex min-h_32 md:min-h_48 bg_bg.default bdr_lg bd-w_1px w_full ov_hidden not-prose example-preview-scope"><div class="d_flex flex-d_column ai_center jc_center flex_1 p_4 md:p_6 w_full"><div class="example-spinner" role="status" aria-label="Loading example"></div></div></div><div data-scope="collapsible" data-part="root" data-state="closed" dir="ltr" id="collapsible:_R_8thanpfn5tlb_"><button class="button button--variant_outline button--size_xs bd-c_inherit c_fg.default w_full bdr-t_0 bd-t-w_0 bg_bg.default c_fg.muted fw_medium fs_xs gap_1.5 hover:bg_gray.2 hover:c_fg.default" data-scope="collapsible" data-part="trigger" id="collapsible:_R_8thanpfn5tlb_:trigger" dir="ltr" type="button" data-state="closed" aria-controls="collapsible:_R_8thanpfn5tlb_:content" aria-expanded="false"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-code icon icon--size_sm" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m16 18 6-6-6-6"></path><path d="m8 6-6 6 6 6"></path></svg>Show Code</button></div></div>
<h3 id="links" class="fs_1.25em lh_1.6 mt_1.6em mb_0.6em fw_600 c_var(--colors-prose-heading) [&amp;_strong]:fw_700 [&amp;_strong]:c_inherit [&amp;_code]:fs_0.9em [&amp;_+_*]:mt_0"><a class="link subheading-anchor" aria-label="Link to section" href="#links"><span class="icon icon-link"></span></a>Links</h3>
<p class="mt_1.25em mb_1.25em c_var(--colors-prose-body) [&amp;_a]:td_underline [&amp;_a]:fw_500">To render menu items as links, use the <code class="c_var(--colors-prose-code) fw_600 bd-w_1px fs_0.875em p_0.125em_0.25em bdr_0.25em bg-c_gray.a2">asChild</code> prop to replace the default element with an anchor tag.</p>
<div class="d_flex flex-d_column gap_0 not-prose [&amp;_&gt;_.example-preview-scope]:bdr-b_0"><div class="d_flex min-h_32 md:min-h_48 bg_bg.default bdr_lg bd-w_1px w_full ov_hidden not-prose example-preview-scope"><div class="d_flex flex-d_column ai_center jc_center flex_1 p_4 md:p_6 w_full"><div class="example-spinner" role="status" aria-label="Loading example"></div></div></div><div data-scope="collapsible" data-part="root" data-state="closed" dir="ltr" id="collapsible:_R_93hanpfn5tlb_"><button class="button button--variant_outline button--size_xs bd-c_inherit c_fg.default w_full bdr-t_0 bd-t-w_0 bg_bg.default c_fg.muted fw_medium fs_xs gap_1.5 hover:bg_gray.2 hover:c_fg.default" data-scope="collapsible" data-part="trigger" id="collapsible:_R_93hanpfn5tlb_:trigger" dir="ltr" type="button" data-state="closed" aria-controls="collapsible:_R_93hanpfn5tlb_:content" aria-expanded="false"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-code icon icon--size_sm" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m16 18 6-6-6-6"></path><path d="m8 6-6 6 6 6"></path></svg>Show Code</button></div></div>
<h3 id="checkbox" class="fs_1.25em lh_1.6 mt_1.6em mb_0.6em fw_600 c_var(--colors-prose-heading) [&amp;_strong]:fw_700 [&amp;_strong]:c_inherit [&amp;_code]:fs_0.9em [&amp;_+_*]:mt_0"><a class="link subheading-anchor" aria-label="Link to section" href="#checkbox"><span class="icon icon-link"></span></a>Checkbox</h3>
<p class="mt_1.25em mb_1.25em c_var(--colors-prose-body) [&amp;_a]:td_underline [&amp;_a]:fw_500">To add a checkbox to a menu item, use the <code class="c_var(--colors-prose-code) fw_600 bd-w_1px fs_0.875em p_0.125em_0.25em bdr_0.25em bg-c_gray.a2">Menu.Checkbox</code> component.</p>
<div class="d_flex flex-d_column gap_0 not-prose [&amp;_&gt;_.example-preview-scope]:bdr-b_0"><div class="d_flex min-h_32 md:min-h_48 bg_bg.default bdr_lg bd-w_1px w_full ov_hidden not-prose example-preview-scope"><div class="d_flex flex-d_column ai_center jc_center flex_1 p_4 md:p_6 w_full"><div class="example-spinner" role="status" aria-label="Loading example"></div></div></div><div data-scope="collapsible" data-part="root" data-state="closed" dir="ltr" id="collapsible:_R_99hanpfn5tlb_"><button class="button button--variant_outline button--size_xs bd-c_inherit c_fg.default w_full bdr-t_0 bd-t-w_0 bg_bg.default c_fg.muted fw_medium fs_xs gap_1.5 hover:bg_gray.2 hover:c_fg.default" data-scope="collapsible" data-part="trigger" id="collapsible:_R_99hanpfn5tlb_:trigger" dir="ltr" type="button" data-state="closed" aria-controls="collapsible:_R_99hanpfn5tlb_:content" aria-expanded="false"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-code icon icon--size_sm" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m16 18 6-6-6-6"></path><path d="m8 6-6 6 6 6"></path></svg>Show Code</button></div></div>
<h3 id="radio-group" class="fs_1.25em lh_1.6 mt_1.6em mb_0.6em fw_600 c_var(--colors-prose-heading) [&amp;_strong]:fw_700 [&amp;_strong]:c_inherit [&amp;_code]:fs_0.9em [&amp;_+_*]:mt_0"><a class="link subheading-anchor" aria-label="Link to section" href="#radio-group"><span class="icon icon-link"></span></a>Radio Group</h3>
<p class="mt_1.25em mb_1.25em c_var(--colors-prose-body) [&amp;_a]:td_underline [&amp;_a]:fw_500">To group radio option items, use the <code class="c_var(--colors-prose-code) fw_600 bd-w_1px fs_0.875em p_0.125em_0.25em bdr_0.25em bg-c_gray.a2">Menu.RadioGroup</code> component.</p>
<div class="d_flex flex-d_column gap_0 not-prose [&amp;_&gt;_.example-preview-scope]:bdr-b_0"><div class="d_flex min-h_32 md:min-h_48 bg_bg.default bdr_lg bd-w_1px w_full ov_hidden not-prose example-preview-scope"><div class="d_flex flex-d_column ai_center jc_center flex_1 p_4 md:p_6 w_full"><div class="example-spinner" role="status" aria-label="Loading example"></div></div></div><div data-scope="collapsible" data-part="root" data-state="closed" dir="ltr" id="collapsible:_R_9fhanpfn5tlb_"><button class="button button--variant_outline button--size_xs bd-c_inherit c_fg.default w_full bdr-t_0 bd-t-w_0 bg_bg.default c_fg.muted fw_medium fs_xs gap_1.5 hover:bg_gray.2 hover:c_fg.default" data-scope="collapsible" data-part="trigger" id="collapsible:_R_9fhanpfn5tlb_:trigger" dir="ltr" type="button" data-state="closed" aria-controls="collapsible:_R_9fhanpfn5tlb_:content" aria-expanded="false"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-code icon icon--size_sm" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m16 18 6-6-6-6"></path><path d="m8 6-6 6 6 6"></path></svg>Show Code</button></div></div>
<h3 id="context-menu" class="fs_1.25em lh_1.6 mt_1.6em mb_0.6em fw_600 c_var(--colors-prose-heading) [&amp;_strong]:fw_700 [&amp;_strong]:c_inherit [&amp;_code]:fs_0.9em [&amp;_+_*]:mt_0"><a class="link subheading-anchor" aria-label="Link to section" href="#context-menu"><span class="icon icon-link"></span></a>Context Menu</h3>
<p class="mt_1.25em mb_1.25em c_var(--colors-prose-body) [&amp;_a]:td_underline [&amp;_a]:fw_500">To show the menu when a trigger element is right-clicked, use the <code class="c_var(--colors-prose-code) fw_600 bd-w_1px fs_0.875em p_0.125em_0.25em bdr_0.25em bg-c_gray.a2">Menu.ContextTrigger</code> component.</p>
<p class="mt_1.25em mb_1.25em c_var(--colors-prose-body) [&amp;_a]:td_underline [&amp;_a]:fw_500">Context menus are also opened during a long-press of roughly <code class="c_var(--colors-prose-code) fw_600 bd-w_1px fs_0.875em p_0.125em_0.25em bdr_0.25em bg-c_gray.a2">700ms</code> when the pointer is pen or touch.</p>
<div class="d_flex flex-d_column gap_0 not-prose [&amp;_&gt;_.example-preview-scope]:bdr-b_0"><div class="d_flex min-h_32 md:min-h_48 bg_bg.default bdr_lg bd-w_1px w_full ov_hidden not-prose example-preview-scope"><div class="d_flex flex-d_column ai_center jc_center flex_1 p_4 md:p_6 w_full"><div class="example-spinner" role="status" aria-label="Loading example"></div></div></div><div data-scope="collapsible" data-part="root" data-state="closed" dir="ltr" id="collapsible:_R_9nhanpfn5tlb_"><button class="button button--variant_outline button--size_xs bd-c_inherit c_fg.default w_full bdr-t_0 bd-t-w_0 bg_bg.default c_fg.muted fw_medium fs_xs gap_1.5 hover:bg_gray.2 hover:c_fg.default" data-scope="collapsible" data-part="trigger" id="collapsible:_R_9nhanpfn5tlb_:trigger" dir="ltr" type="button" data-state="closed" aria-controls="collapsible:_R_9nhanpfn5tlb_:content" aria-expanded="false"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-code icon icon--size_sm" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m16 18 6-6-6-6"></path><path d="m8 6-6 6 6 6"></path></svg>Show Code</button></div></div>
<h3 id="nested" class="fs_1.25em lh_1.6 mt_1.6em mb_0.6em fw_600 c_var(--colors-prose-heading) [&amp;_strong]:fw_700 [&amp;_strong]:c_inherit [&amp;_code]:fs_0.9em [&amp;_+_*]:mt_0"><a class="link subheading-anchor" aria-label="Link to section" href="#nested"><span class="icon icon-link"></span></a>Nested</h3>
<p class="mt_1.25em mb_1.25em c_var(--colors-prose-body) [&amp;_a]:td_underline [&amp;_a]:fw_500">To show a nested menu, render another <code class="c_var(--colors-prose-code) fw_600 bd-w_1px fs_0.875em p_0.125em_0.25em bdr_0.25em bg-c_gray.a2">Menu</code> component and use the <code class="c_var(--colors-prose-code) fw_600 bd-w_1px fs_0.875em p_0.125em_0.25em bdr_0.25em bg-c_gray.a2">Menu.TriggerItem</code> component to open the submenu.</p>
<div class="d_flex flex-d_column gap_0 not-prose [&amp;_&gt;_.example-preview-scope]:bdr-b_0"><div class="d_flex min-h_32 md:min-h_48 bg_bg.default bdr_lg bd-w_1px w_full ov_hidden not-prose example-preview-scope"><div class="d_flex flex-d_column ai_center jc_center flex_1 p_4 md:p_6 w_full"><div class="example-spinner" role="status" aria-label="Loading example"></div></div></div><div data-scope="collapsible" data-part="root" data-state="closed" dir="ltr" id="collapsible:_R_9thanpfn5tlb_"><button class="button button--variant_outline button--size_xs bd-c_inherit c_fg.default w_full bdr-t_0 bd-t-w_0 bg_bg.default c_fg.muted fw_medium fs_xs gap_1.5 hover:bg_gray.2 hover:c_fg.default" data-scope="collapsible" data-part="trigger" id="collapsible:_R_9thanpfn5tlb_:trigger" dir="ltr" type="button" data-state="closed" aria-controls="collapsible:_R_9thanpfn5tlb_:content" aria-expanded="false"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-code icon icon--size_sm" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m16 18 6-6-6-6"></path><path d="m8 6-6 6 6 6"></path></svg>Show Code</button></div></div>
<h3 id="menu-in-dialog" class="fs_1.25em lh_1.6 mt_1.6em mb_0.6em fw_600 c_var(--colors-prose-heading) [&amp;_strong]:fw_700 [&amp;_strong]:c_inherit [&amp;_code]:fs_0.9em [&amp;_+_*]:mt_0"><a class="link subheading-anchor" aria-label="Link to section" href="#menu-in-dialog"><span class="icon icon-link"></span></a>Menu in Dialog</h3>
<p class="mt_1.25em mb_1.25em c_var(--colors-prose-body) [&amp;_a]:td_underline [&amp;_a]:fw_500">When rendering a menu inside a dialog, use <code class="c_var(--colors-prose-code) fw_600 bd-w_1px fs_0.875em p_0.125em_0.25em bdr_0.25em bg-c_gray.a2">lazyMount</code> and <code class="c_var(--colors-prose-code) fw_600 bd-w_1px fs_0.875em p_0.125em_0.25em bdr_0.25em bg-c_gray.a2">unmountOnExit</code> to ensure proper cleanup when the dialog
closes.</p>
<div class="d_flex flex-d_column gap_0 not-prose [&amp;_&gt;_.example-preview-scope]:bdr-b_0"><div class="d_flex min-h_32 md:min-h_48 bg_bg.default bdr_lg bd-w_1px w_full ov_hidden not-prose example-preview-scope"><div class="d_flex flex-d_column ai_center jc_center flex_1 p_4 md:p_6 w_full"><div class="example-spinner" role="status" aria-label="Loading example"></div></div></div><div data-scope="collapsible" data-part="root" data-state="closed" dir="ltr" id="collapsible:_R_a3hanpfn5tlb_"><button class="button button--variant_outline button--size_xs bd-c_inherit c_fg.default w_full bdr-t_0 bd-t-w_0 bg_bg.default c_fg.muted fw_medium fs_xs gap_1.5 hover:bg_gray.2 hover:c_fg.default" data-scope="collapsible" data-part="trigger" id="collapsible:_R_a3hanpfn5tlb_:trigger" dir="ltr" type="button" data-state="closed" aria-controls="collapsible:_R_a3hanpfn5tlb_:content" aria-expanded="false"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-code icon icon--size_sm" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m16 18 6-6-6-6"></path><path d="m8 6-6 6 6 6"></path></svg>Show Code</button></div></div>
<h3 id="menu-item-dialog" class="fs_1.25em lh_1.6 mt_1.6em mb_0.6em fw_600 c_var(--colors-prose-heading) [&amp;_strong]:fw_700 [&amp;_strong]:c_inherit [&amp;_code]:fs_0.9em [&amp;_+_*]:mt_0"><a class="link subheading-anchor" aria-label="Link to section" href="#menu-item-dialog"><span class="icon icon-link"></span></a>Menu Item Dialog</h3>
<p class="mt_1.25em mb_1.25em c_var(--colors-prose-body) [&amp;_a]:td_underline [&amp;_a]:fw_500">Open a confirmation dialog from a menu item. This pattern is useful for destructive actions like delete that require
user confirmation.</p>
<div class="d_flex flex-d_column gap_0 not-prose [&amp;_&gt;_.example-preview-scope]:bdr-b_0"><div class="d_flex min-h_32 md:min-h_48 bg_bg.default bdr_lg bd-w_1px w_full ov_hidden not-prose example-preview-scope"><div class="d_flex flex-d_column ai_center jc_center flex_1 p_4 md:p_6 w_full"><div class="example-spinner" role="status" aria-label="Loading example"></div></div></div><div data-scope="collapsible" data-part="root" data-state="closed" dir="ltr" id="collapsible:_R_a9hanpfn5tlb_"><button class="button button--variant_outline button--size_xs bd-c_inherit c_fg.default w_full bdr-t_0 bd-t-w_0 bg_bg.default c_fg.muted fw_medium fs_xs gap_1.5 hover:bg_gray.2 hover:c_fg.default" data-scope="collapsible" data-part="trigger" id="collapsible:_R_a9hanpfn5tlb_:trigger" dir="ltr" type="button" data-state="closed" aria-controls="collapsible:_R_a9hanpfn5tlb_:content" aria-expanded="false"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-code icon icon--size_sm" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m16 18 6-6-6-6"></path><path d="m8 6-6 6 6 6"></path></svg>Show Code</button></div></div>
<h2 id="guides" class="fs_1.5em mt_2em mb_1em lh_1.3333333 fw_700 c_var(--colors-prose-heading) [&amp;_strong]:fw_800 [&amp;_strong]:c_inherit [&amp;_code]:fs_0.875em [&amp;_+_*]:mt_0"><a class="link subheading-anchor" aria-label="Link to section" href="#guides"><span class="icon icon-link"></span></a>Guides</h2>
<h3 id="custom-ids" class="fs_1.25em lh_1.6 mt_1.6em mb_0.6em fw_600 c_var(--colors-prose-heading) [&amp;_strong]:fw_700 [&amp;_strong]:c_inherit [&amp;_code]:fs_0.9em [&amp;_+_*]:mt_0"><a class="link subheading-anchor" aria-label="Link to section" href="#custom-ids"><span class="icon icon-link"></span></a>Custom IDs</h3>
<p class="mt_1.25em mb_1.25em c_var(--colors-prose-body) [&amp;_a]:td_underline [&amp;_a]:fw_500">Ark UI autogenerates ids for menu items internally. Passing a custom <code class="c_var(--colors-prose-code) fw_600 bd-w_1px fs_0.875em p_0.125em_0.25em bdr_0.25em bg-c_gray.a2">id</code> prop breaks the internal <code class="c_var(--colors-prose-code) fw_600 bd-w_1px fs_0.875em p_0.125em_0.25em bdr_0.25em bg-c_gray.a2">getElementById</code>
functionality used by the component.</p>
<pre class="fs_0.875em lh_1.7142857 mt_1.7142857em mb_1.7142857em bdr_0.375rem p_4 color-scheme_dark [&amp;_code]:bg-c_transparent [&amp;_code]:bd-w_0 [&amp;_code]:bdr_0 [&amp;_code]:p_0 [&amp;_code]:fw_inherit [&amp;_code]:c_inherit [&amp;_code]:fs_inherit [&amp;_code]:ff_inherit [&amp;_code]:lh_inherit shiki github-dark-default" style="background-color:#0d1117;color:#e6edf3" tabindex="0"><code class="c_var(--colors-prose-code) fw_600 bd-w_1px fs_0.875em p_0.125em_0.25em bdr_0.25em bg-c_gray.a2"><span class="line"><span style="color:#8B949E">// ❌ Don&#x27;t do this</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E6EDF3">&lt;</span><span style="color:#7EE787">Menu.Item</span><span style="color:#79C0FF"> id</span><span style="color:#FF7B72">=</span><span style="color:#A5D6FF">&quot;custom-id&quot;</span><span style="color:#79C0FF"> value</span><span style="color:#FF7B72">=</span><span style="color:#A5D6FF">&quot;custom-value&quot;</span><span style="color:#E6EDF3">&gt;</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E6EDF3">  Custom Item</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E6EDF3">&lt;/</span><span style="color:#7EE787">Menu.Item</span><span style="color:#E6EDF3">&gt;</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#8B949E">// ✅ Do this</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E6EDF3">&lt;</span><span style="color:#7EE787">Menu.Item</span><span style="color:#79C0FF"> value</span><span style="color:#FF7B72">=</span><span style="color:#A5D6FF">&quot;custom-value&quot;</span><span style="color:#E6EDF3">&gt;</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E6EDF3">  Custom Item</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E6EDF3">&lt;/</span><span style="color:#7EE787">Menu.Item</span><span style="color:#E6EDF3">&gt;</span></span></code></pre>
<h3 id="links-1" class="fs_1.25em lh_1.6 mt_1.6em mb_0.6em fw_600 c_var(--colors-prose-heading) [&amp;_strong]:fw_700 [&amp;_strong]:c_inherit [&amp;_code]:fs_0.9em [&amp;_+_*]:mt_0"><a class="link subheading-anchor" aria-label="Link to section" href="#links-1"><span class="icon icon-link"></span></a>Links</h3>
<p class="mt_1.25em mb_1.25em c_var(--colors-prose-body) [&amp;_a]:td_underline [&amp;_a]:fw_500">To render a menu item as a link, render the link as the menu item itself using the <code class="c_var(--colors-prose-code) fw_600 bd-w_1px fs_0.875em p_0.125em_0.25em bdr_0.25em bg-c_gray.a2">asChild</code> prop, not as a child of the
menu item.</p>
<blockquote class="mt_1.6em mb_1.6em ps_1em fw_500 font-style_italic bd-s-w_0.25rem bd-c_var(--colors-prose-quote-border)">
<p class="mt_1.25em mb_1.25em c_var(--colors-prose-body) [&amp;_a]:td_underline [&amp;_a]:fw_500">This pattern ensures the link element receives the correct ARIA attributes and keyboard interactions from the menu
item.</p>
</blockquote>
<p class="mt_1.25em mb_1.25em c_var(--colors-prose-body) [&amp;_a]:td_underline [&amp;_a]:fw_500">Here&#x27;s an example of a reusable <code class="c_var(--colors-prose-code) fw_600 bd-w_1px fs_0.875em p_0.125em_0.25em bdr_0.25em bg-c_gray.a2">MenuItemLink</code> component:</p>
<pre class="fs_0.875em lh_1.7142857 mt_1.7142857em mb_1.7142857em bdr_0.375rem p_4 color-scheme_dark [&amp;_code]:bg-c_transparent [&amp;_code]:bd-w_0 [&amp;_code]:bdr_0 [&amp;_code]:p_0 [&amp;_code]:fw_inherit [&amp;_code]:c_inherit [&amp;_code]:fs_inherit [&amp;_code]:ff_inherit [&amp;_code]:lh_inherit shiki github-dark-default" style="background-color:#0d1117;color:#e6edf3" tabindex="0"><code class="c_var(--colors-prose-code) fw_600 bd-w_1px fs_0.875em p_0.125em_0.25em bdr_0.25em bg-c_gray.a2"><span class="line"><span style="color:#FF7B72">interface</span><span style="color:#FFA657"> MenuItemLinkProps</span><span style="color:#FF7B72"> extends</span><span style="color:#FFA657"> Menu</span><span style="color:#E6EDF3">.</span><span style="color:#79C0FF">ItemProps</span><span style="color:#E6EDF3"> {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#FFA657">  href</span><span style="color:#FF7B72">?:</span><span style="color:#79C0FF"> string</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#FFA657">  target</span><span style="color:#FF7B72">?:</span><span style="color:#79C0FF"> string</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E6EDF3">}</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#FF7B72">export</span><span style="color:#FF7B72"> const</span><span style="color:#D2A8FF"> MenuItemLink</span><span style="color:#FF7B72"> =</span><span style="color:#E6EDF3"> (</span><span style="color:#FFA657">props</span><span style="color:#FF7B72">:</span><span style="color:#FFA657"> MenuItemLinkProps</span><span style="color:#E6EDF3">) </span><span style="color:#FF7B72">=&gt;</span><span style="color:#E6EDF3"> {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#FF7B72">  const</span><span style="color:#E6EDF3"> { </span><span style="color:#79C0FF">href</span><span style="color:#E6EDF3">, </span><span style="color:#79C0FF">target</span><span style="color:#E6EDF3">, </span><span style="color:#79C0FF">children</span><span style="color:#E6EDF3">, </span><span style="color:#FF7B72">...</span><span style="color:#79C0FF">rest</span><span style="color:#E6EDF3"> } </span><span style="color:#FF7B72">=</span><span style="color:#E6EDF3"> props</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#FF7B72">  return</span><span style="color:#E6EDF3"> (</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E6EDF3">    &lt;</span><span style="color:#7EE787">Menu.Item</span><span style="color:#FF7B72"> {...</span><span style="color:#E6EDF3">rest</span><span style="color:#FF7B72">}</span><span style="color:#79C0FF"> asChild</span><span style="color:#E6EDF3">&gt;</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E6EDF3">      &lt;</span><span style="color:#7EE787">a</span><span style="color:#79C0FF"> href</span><span style="color:#FF7B72">={</span><span style="color:#E6EDF3">href</span><span style="color:#FF7B72">}</span><span style="color:#79C0FF"> target</span><span style="color:#FF7B72">={</span><span style="color:#E6EDF3">target</span><span style="color:#FF7B72">}</span><span style="color:#E6EDF3">&gt;</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#FF7B72">        {</span><span style="color:#E6EDF3">children</span><span style="color:#FF7B72">}</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E6EDF3">      &lt;/</span><span style="color:#7EE787">a</span><span style="color:#E6EDF3">&gt;</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E6EDF3">    &lt;/</span><span style="color:#7EE787">Menu.Item</span><span style="color:#E6EDF3">&gt;</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E6EDF3">  )</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E6EDF3">}</span></span></code></pre>

void</code><p class="text">Function to open or close the menu</p></div></td></tr><tr class="table__row table__row--size_sm table__row--variant_outline"><td class="w_36 px_4 py_2 va_top table__cell table__cell--size_sm table__cell--variant_outline"><code class="code code--size_sm code--variant_outline c_colorPalette.default">highlightedValue</code></td><td class="px_4 py_2 va_top table__cell table__cell--size_sm table__cell--variant_outline"><div class="d_flex flex-d_column ai_start gap_1"><code class="code code--size_sm code--variant_outline">string</code><p class="text">The id of the currently highlighted menuitem</p></div></td></tr><tr class="table__row table__row--size_sm table__row--variant_outline"><td class="w_36 px_4 py_2 va_top table__cell table__cell--size_sm table__cell--variant_outline"><code class="code code--size_sm code--variant_outline c_colorPalette.default">setHighlightedValue</code></td><td class="px_4 py_2 va_top table__cell table__cell--size_sm table__cell--variant_outline"><div class="d_flex flex-d_column ai_start gap_1"><code class="code code--size_sm code--variant_outline">(value: string) =&gt; void</code><p class="text">Function to register a parent menu. This is used for submenus</p></div></td></tr><tr class="table__row table__row--size_sm table__row--variant_outline"><td class="w_36 px_4 py_2 va_top table__cell table__cell--size_sm table__cell--variant_outline"><code class="code code--size_sm code--variant_outline c_colorPalette.default">setChild</code></td><td class="px_4 py_2 va_top table__cell table__cell--size_sm table__cell--variant_outline"><div class="d_flex flex-d_column ai_start gap_1"><code class="code code--size_sm code--variant_outline">(child: ChildMenuService) =&gt; void</code><p class="text">Function to register a child menu. OptionItemState</code><p class="text">Returns the state of the option item</p></div></td></tr><tr class="table__row table__row--size_sm table__row--variant_outline"><td class="w_36 px_4 py_2 va_top table__cell table__cell--size_sm table__cell--variant_outline"><code class="code code--size_sm code--variant_outline c_colorPalette.default">getItemState</code></td><td class="px_4 py_2 va_top table__cell table__cell--size_sm table__cell--variant_outline"><div class="d_flex flex-d_column ai_start gap_1"><code class="code code--size_sm code--variant_outline">(props: ItemProps) =&gt; <h2 id="accessibility" class="fs_1.5em mt_2em mb_1em lh_1.3333333 fw_700 c_var(--colors-prose-heading) [&amp;_strong]:fw_800 [&amp;_strong]:c_inherit [&amp;_code]:fs_0.875em [&amp;_+_*]:mt_0"><a class="link subheading-anchor" aria-label="Link to section" href="#accessibility"><span class="icon icon-link"></span></a>Accessibility</h2>
<p class="mt_1.25em mb_1.25em c_var(--colors-prose-body) [&amp;_a]:td_underline [&amp;_a]:fw_500">Complies with the <a target="_blank" rel="noopener" href="https://www.w3.org/WAI/ARIA/apg/patterns/menubar/" class="link">Menu WAI-ARIA design pattern</a>.</p>
<h3 id="keyboard-support" class="fs_1.25em lh_1.6 mt_1.6em mb_0.6em fw_600 c_var(--colors-prose-heading) [&amp;_strong]:fw_700 [&amp;_strong]:c_inherit [&amp;_code]:fs_0.9em [&amp;_+_*]:mt_0"><a class="link subheading-anchor" aria-label="Link to section" href="#keyboard-support"><span class="icon icon-link"></span></a>Keyboard Support</h3>
<div class="bd-w_1px bdr_lg ov-x_auto not-prose"><table class="bd_0 table__root table__root--size_sm table__root--variant_outline"><thead class="table__head table__head--size_sm table__cell--variant_outline">Activates/Selects the highlighted item</td></tr><tr class="table__row table__row--size_sm table__row--variant_outline"><td class="px_4 py_2 table__cell py_2 table__cell table__cell--size_sm table__cell--variant_outline">Highlights the next item in the menu</td></tr><tr class="table__row table__row--size_sm table__row--variant_outline"><td class="px_4 class="px_4 py_2 table__cell table__cell--size_sm table__cell--variant_outline"><div class="d_flex ai_center gap_1 flex-d_row"><kbd class="kbd kbd--size_sm c_gray.a11 px_1">ArrowRight</kbd><kbd Anatomy\n\n\u003cAnatomy id=\"menu\" /\u003e\n\n```tsx\n\u003cMenu.Root\u003e\n  \u003cMenu.Trigger\u003e\n    \u003cMenu.Indicator /\u003e\n  \u003c/Menu.Trigger\u003e\n  \u003cMenu.Positioner\u003e\n    \u003cMenu.Content\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.Arrow\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.ArrowTip /\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.Arrow\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.Item /\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.ItemGroup\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.ItemGroupLabel /\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Item /\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.ItemGroup\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.Separator /\u003e\n    \u003c/Menu.Content\u003e\n  \u003c/Menu.Positioner\u003e\n\u003c/Menu.Root\u003e\n```\n\n## Examples\n\n**Example: basic**\n\n#### React\n\n```tsx\nimport { Menu } from '@ark-ui/react/menu'\nimport { ChevronDownIcon } from 'lucide-react'\nimport styles from 'styles/menu.module.css'\n\nexport const Basic = () =\u003e (\n  \u003cMenu.Root\u003e\n    \u003cMenu.Trigger className={styles.Trigger}\u003e\n      File\n      \u003cMenu.Indicator className={styles.Indicator}\u003e\n        \u003cChevronDownIcon /\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.Indicator\u003e\n    \u003c/Menu.Trigger\u003e\n    \u003cMenu.Positioner\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.Content className={styles.Content}\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Arrow className={styles.Arrow}\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.ArrowTip className={styles.ArrowTip} /\u003e\n        \u003c/Menu.Arrow\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Item className={styles.Item} value=\"new-file\"\u003e\n          New File\n        \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Item className={styles.Item} value=\"open\"\u003e\n          Open...\n        \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Item className={styles.Item} value=\"save\"\u003e\n          Save\n        \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Item className={styles.Item} value=\"save-as\"\u003e\n          Save As...\n        \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.Content\u003e\n    \u003c/Menu.Positioner\u003e\n  \u003c/Menu.Root\u003e\n)\n\n```\n\n#### Solid\n\n```tsx\nimport { Menu } from '@ark-ui/solid/menu'\nimport { ChevronDownIcon } from 'lucide-solid'\nimport styles from 'styles/menu.module.css'\n\nexport const Basic = () =\u003e (\n  \u003cMenu.Root\u003e\n    \u003cMenu.Trigger class={styles.Trigger}\u003e\n      File\n      \u003cMenu.Indicator class={styles.Indicator}\u003e\n        \u003cChevronDownIcon /\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.Indicator\u003e\n    \u003c/Menu.Trigger\u003e\n    \u003cMenu.Positioner\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.Content class={styles.Content}\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Arrow class={styles.Arrow}\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.ArrowTip class={styles.ArrowTip} /\u003e\n        \u003c/Menu.Arrow\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"new-file\"\u003e\n          New File\n        \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"open\"\u003e\n          Open...\n        \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"save\"\u003e\n          Save\n        \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"save-as\"\u003e\n          Save As...\n        \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.Content\u003e\n    \u003c/Menu.Positioner\u003e\n  \u003c/Menu.Root\u003e\n)\n\n```\n\n#### Vue\n\n```vue\n\u003cscript setup lang=\"ts\"\u003e\nimport { Menu } from '@ark-ui/vue/menu'\nimport { ChevronDownIcon } from 'lucide-vue-next'\nimport styles from 'styles/menu.module.css'\n\u003c/script\u003e\n\n\u003ctemplate\u003e\n  \u003cMenu.Root\u003e\n    \u003cMenu.Trigger :class=\"styles.Trigger\"\u003e\n      File\n      \u003cMenu.Indicator :class=\"styles.Indicator\"\u003e\n        \u003cChevronDownIcon /\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.Indicator\u003e\n    \u003c/Menu.Trigger\u003e\n    \u003cMenu.Positioner\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.Content :class=\"styles.Content\"\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Arrow :class=\"styles.Arrow\"\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.ArrowTip :class=\"styles.ArrowTip\" /\u003e\n        \u003c/Menu.Arrow\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Item :class=\"styles.Item\" value=\"new-file\"\u003eNew File\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Item :class=\"styles.Item\" value=\"open\"\u003eOpen...\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Item :class=\"styles.Item\" value=\"save\"\u003eSave\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Item :class=\"styles.Item\" value=\"save-as\"\u003eSave As...\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.Content\u003e\n    \u003c/Menu.Positioner\u003e\n  \u003c/Menu.Root\u003e\n\u003c/template\u003e\n\n```\n\n#### Svelte\n\n```svelte\n\u003cscript lang=\"ts\"\u003e\n  import { Menu } from '@ark-ui/svelte/menu'\n  import { ChevronDownIcon } from 'lucide-svelte'\n  import styles from 'styles/menu.module.css'\n\u003c/script\u003e\n\n\u003cMenu.Root\u003e\n  \u003cMenu.Trigger class={styles.Trigger}\u003e\n    File\n    \u003cMenu.Indicator class={styles.Indicator}\u003e\n      \u003cChevronDownIcon /\u003e\n    \u003c/Menu.Indicator\u003e\n  \u003c/Menu.Trigger\u003e\n  \u003cMenu.Positioner\u003e\n    \u003cMenu.Content class={styles.Content}\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.Arrow class={styles.Arrow}\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.ArrowTip class={styles.ArrowTip} /\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.Arrow\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"new-file\"\u003eNew File\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"open\"\u003eOpen...\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"save\"\u003eSave\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"save-as\"\u003eSave As...\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n    \u003c/Menu.Content\u003e\n  \u003c/Menu.Positioner\u003e\n\u003c/Menu.Root\u003e\n\n```\n\n### Item Selection\n\nUse `onSelect` to handle item selection. The callback receives the item's `id`.\n\n**Example: controlled**\n\n#### React\n\n```tsx\nimport { Menu } from '@ark-ui/react/menu'\nimport { ChevronDownIcon } from 'lucide-react'\nimport { useState } from 'react'\nimport button from 'styles/button.module.css'\nimport styles from 'styles/menu.module.css'\n\nexport const Controlled = () =\u003e {\n  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false)\n\n  return (\n    \u003cdiv className=\"stack\"\u003e\n      \u003cbutton type=\"button\" className={button.Root} onClick={() =\u003e setOpen(!open)}\u003e\n        Toggle\n      \u003c/button\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.Root open={open} onOpenChange={(e) =\u003e setOpen(e.open)}\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Trigger className={styles.Trigger}\u003e\n          Actions\n          \u003cMenu.Indicator className={styles.Indicator}\u003e\n            \u003cChevronDownIcon /\u003e\n          \u003c/Menu.Indicator\u003e\n        \u003c/Menu.Trigger\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Positioner\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.Content className={styles.Content}\u003e\n            \u003cMenu.Item className={styles.Item} value=\"edit\"\u003e\n              Edit\n            \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n            \u003cMenu.Item className={styles.Item} value=\"duplicate\"\u003e\n              Duplicate\n            \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n            \u003cMenu.Item className={styles.Item} value=\"archive\"\u003e\n              Archive\n            \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n            \u003cMenu.Item className={styles.Item} value=\"delete\"\u003e\n              Delete\n            \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n          \u003c/Menu.Content\u003e\n        \u003c/Menu.Positioner\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.Root\u003e\n    \u003c/div\u003e\n  )\n}\n\n```\n\n#### Solid\n\n```tsx\nimport { Menu } from '@ark-ui/solid/menu'\nimport { ChevronDownIcon } from 'lucide-solid'\nimport { createSignal } from 'solid-js'\nimport button from 'styles/button.module.css'\nimport styles from 'styles/menu.module.css'\n\nexport const Controlled = () =\u003e {\n  const [open, setOpen] = createSignal(false)\n\n  return (\n    \u003cdiv class=\"stack\"\u003e\n      \u003cbutton type=\"button\" class={button.Root} onClick={() =\u003e setOpen(!open())}\u003e\n        Toggle\n      \u003c/button\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.Root open={open()} onOpenChange={(e) =\u003e setOpen(e.open)}\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Trigger class={styles.Trigger}\u003e\n          Actions\n          \u003cMenu.Indicator class={styles.Indicator}\u003e\n            \u003cChevronDownIcon /\u003e\n          \u003c/Menu.Indicator\u003e\n        \u003c/Menu.Trigger\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Positioner\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.Content class={styles.Content}\u003e\n            \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"edit\"\u003e\n              Edit\n            \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n            \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"duplicate\"\u003e\n              Duplicate\n            \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n            \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"archive\"\u003e\n              Archive\n            \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n            \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"delete\"\u003e\n              Delete\n            \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n          \u003c/Menu.Content\u003e\n        \u003c/Menu.Positioner\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.Root\u003e\n    \u003c/div\u003e\n  )\n}\n\n```\n\n#### Vue\n\n```vue\n\u003cscript setup lang=\"ts\"\u003e\nimport { Menu } from '@ark-ui/vue/menu'\nimport { ChevronDownIcon } from 'lucide-vue-next'\nimport { ref } from 'vue'\nimport button from 'styles/button.module.css'\nimport styles from 'styles/menu.module.css'\n\nconst open = ref(false)\n\u003c/script\u003e\n\n\u003ctemplate\u003e\n  \u003cdiv class=\"stack\"\u003e\n    \u003cbutton type=\"button\" :class=\"button.Root\" @click=\"open = !open\"\u003eToggle\u003c/button\u003e\n    \u003cMenu.Root v-model:open=\"open\"\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.Trigger :class=\"styles.Trigger\"\u003e\n        Actions\n        \u003cMenu.Indicator :class=\"styles.Indicator\"\u003e\n          \u003cChevronDownIcon /\u003e\n        \u003c/Menu.Indicator\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.Trigger\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.Positioner\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Content :class=\"styles.Content\"\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.Item :class=\"styles.Item\" value=\"edit\"\u003eEdit\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.Item :class=\"styles.Item\" value=\"duplicate\"\u003eDuplicate\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.Item :class=\"styles.Item\" value=\"archive\"\u003eArchive\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.Item :class=\"styles.Item\" value=\"delete\"\u003eDelete\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n        \u003c/Menu.Content\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.Positioner\u003e\n    \u003c/Menu.Root\u003e\n  \u003c/div\u003e\n\u003c/template\u003e\n\n```\n\n#### Svelte\n\n```svelte\n\u003cscript lang=\"ts\"\u003e\n  import { Menu } from '@ark-ui/svelte/menu'\n  import { ChevronDownIcon } from 'lucide-svelte'\n  import button from 'styles/button.module.css'\n  import styles from 'styles/menu.module.css'\n\n  let open = $state(false)\n\u003c/script\u003e\n\n\u003cdiv class=\"stack\"\u003e\n  \u003cbutton type=\"button\" class={button.Root} onclick={() =\u003e (open = !open)}\u003eToggle\u003c/button\u003e\n  \u003cMenu.Root bind:open\u003e\n    \u003cMenu.Trigger class={styles.Trigger}\u003e\n      Actions\n      \u003cMenu.Indicator class={styles.Indicator}\u003e\n        \u003cChevronDownIcon /\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.Indicator\u003e\n    \u003c/Menu.Trigger\u003e\n    \u003cMenu.Positioner\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.Content class={styles.Content}\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"edit\"\u003eEdit\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"duplicate\"\u003eDuplicate\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"archive\"\u003eArchive\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"delete\"\u003eDelete\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.Content\u003e\n    \u003c/Menu.Positioner\u003e\n  \u003c/Menu.Root\u003e\n\u003c/div\u003e\n\n```\n\n### Root Provider\n\nAn alternative way to control the menu is to use the `RootProvider` component and the `useMenu` hook. This way you can\naccess the state and methods from outside the component.\n\n**Example: root-provider**\n\n#### React\n\n```tsx\nimport { Menu, useMenu } from '@ark-ui/react/menu'\nimport { ChevronDownIcon } from 'lucide-react'\nimport button from 'styles/button.module.css'\nimport styles from 'styles/menu.module.css'\n\nexport const RootProvider = () =\u003e {\n  const menu = useMenu()\n\n  return (\n    \u003cdiv className=\"stack\"\u003e\n      \u003cbutton className={button.Root} onClick={() =\u003e menu.api.setHighlightedValue('copy')}\u003e\n        Highlight Copy\n      \u003c/button\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.RootProvider value={menu}\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Trigger className={styles.Trigger}\u003e\n          Edit\n          \u003cMenu.Indicator className={styles.Indicator}\u003e\n            \u003cChevronDownIcon /\u003e\n          \u003c/Menu.Indicator\u003e\n        \u003c/Menu.Trigger\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Positioner\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.Content className={styles.Content}\u003e\n            \u003cMenu.Item className={styles.Item} value=\"cut\"\u003e\n              Cut\n            \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n            \u003cMenu.Item className={styles.Item} value=\"copy\"\u003e\n              Copy\n            \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n            \u003cMenu.Item className={styles.Item} value=\"paste\"\u003e\n              Paste\n            \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n            \u003cMenu.Item className={styles.Item} value=\"delete\"\u003e\n              Delete\n            \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n          \u003c/Menu.Content\u003e\n        \u003c/Menu.Positioner\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.RootProvider\u003e\n    \u003c/div\u003e\n  )\n}\n\n```\n\n#### Solid\n\n```tsx\nimport { Menu, useMenu } from '@ark-ui/solid/menu'\nimport { ChevronDownIcon } from 'lucide-solid'\nimport button from 'styles/button.module.css'\nimport styles from 'styles/menu.module.css'\n\nexport const RootProvider = () =\u003e {\n  const menu = useMenu()\n\n  return (\n    \u003cdiv class=\"stack\"\u003e\n      \u003cbutton class={button.Root} onClick={() =\u003e menu.api().setHighlightedValue('copy')}\u003e\n        Highlight Copy\n      \u003c/button\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.RootProvider value={menu}\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Trigger class={styles.Trigger}\u003e\n          Edit\n          \u003cMenu.Indicator class={styles.Indicator}\u003e\n            \u003cChevronDownIcon /\u003e\n          \u003c/Menu.Indicator\u003e\n        \u003c/Menu.Trigger\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Positioner\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.Content class={styles.Content}\u003e\n            \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"cut\"\u003e\n              Cut\n            \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n            \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"copy\"\u003e\n              Copy\n            \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n            \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"paste\"\u003e\n              Paste\n            \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n            \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"delete\"\u003e\n              Delete\n            \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n          \u003c/Menu.Content\u003e\n        \u003c/Menu.Positioner\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.RootProvider\u003e\n    \u003c/div\u003e\n  )\n}\n\n```\n\n#### Vue\n\n```vue\n\u003cscript setup lang=\"ts\"\u003e\nimport { Menu, useMenu } from '@ark-ui/vue/menu'\nimport { ChevronDownIcon } from 'lucide-vue-next'\nimport button from 'styles/button.module.css'\nimport styles from 'styles/menu.module.css'\n\nconst menu = useMenu()\n\u003c/script\u003e\n\n\u003ctemplate\u003e\n  \u003cdiv class=\"stack\"\u003e\n    \u003cbutton :class=\"button.Root\" @click=\"menu.api.value.setHighlightedValue('copy')\"\u003eHighlight Copy\u003c/button\u003e\n    \u003cMenu.RootProvider :value=\"menu\"\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.Trigger :class=\"styles.Trigger\"\u003e\n        Edit\n        \u003cMenu.Indicator :class=\"styles.Indicator\"\u003e\n          \u003cChevronDownIcon /\u003e\n        \u003c/Menu.Indicator\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.Trigger\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.Positioner\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Content :class=\"styles.Content\"\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.Item :class=\"styles.Item\" value=\"cut\"\u003eCut\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.Item :class=\"styles.Item\" value=\"copy\"\u003eCopy\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.Item :class=\"styles.Item\" value=\"paste\"\u003ePaste\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.Item :class=\"styles.Item\" value=\"delete\"\u003eDelete\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n        \u003c/Menu.Content\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.Positioner\u003e\n    \u003c/Menu.RootProvider\u003e\n  \u003c/div\u003e\n\u003c/template\u003e\n\n```\n\n#### Svelte\n\n```svelte\n\u003cscript lang=\"ts\"\u003e\n  import { Menu, useMenu } from '@ark-ui/svelte/menu'\n  import { ChevronDownIcon } from 'lucide-svelte'\n  import button from 'styles/button.module.css'\n  import styles from 'styles/menu.module.css'\n\n  const menu = useMenu()\n\u003c/script\u003e\n\n\u003cdiv class=\"stack\"\u003e\n  \u003cbutton class={button.Root} onclick={() =\u003e menu().api.setHighlightedValue('copy')}\u003eHighlight Copy\u003c/button\u003e\n  \u003cMenu.RootProvider value={menu}\u003e\n    \u003cMenu.Trigger class={styles.Trigger}\u003e\n      Edit\n      \u003cMenu.Indicator class={styles.Indicator}\u003e\n        \u003cChevronDownIcon /\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.Indicator\u003e\n    \u003c/Menu.Trigger\u003e\n    \u003cMenu.Positioner\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.Content class={styles.Content}\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"cut\"\u003eCut\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"copy\"\u003eCopy\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"paste\"\u003ePaste\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"delete\"\u003eDelete\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.Content\u003e\n    \u003c/Menu.Positioner\u003e\n  \u003c/Menu.RootProvider\u003e\n\u003c/div\u003e\n\n```\n\n### Grouping\n\nUse `Menu.ItemGroup` and `Menu.ItemGroupLabel` to organize related menu items.\n\n**Example: group**\n\n#### React\n\n```tsx\nimport { Menu } from '@ark-ui/react/menu'\nimport { ChevronDownIcon } from 'lucide-react'\nimport styles from 'styles/menu.module.css'\n\nexport const Group = () =\u003e (\n  \u003cMenu.Root\u003e\n    \u003cMenu.Trigger className={styles.Trigger}\u003e\n      Edit\n      \u003cMenu.Indicator className={styles.Indicator}\u003e\n        \u003cChevronDownIcon /\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.Indicator\u003e\n    \u003c/Menu.Trigger\u003e\n    \u003cMenu.Positioner\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.Content className={styles.Content}\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.ItemGroup className={styles.ItemGroup}\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.ItemGroupLabel className={styles.ItemGroupLabel}\u003eClipboard\u003c/Menu.ItemGroupLabel\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.Item className={styles.Item} value=\"cut\"\u003e\n            Cut\n          \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.Item className={styles.Item} value=\"copy\"\u003e\n            Copy\n          \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.Item className={styles.Item} value=\"paste\"\u003e\n            Paste\n          \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n        \u003c/Menu.ItemGroup\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.ItemGroup className={styles.ItemGroup}\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.ItemGroupLabel className={styles.ItemGroupLabel}\u003eSelection\u003c/Menu.ItemGroupLabel\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.Item className={styles.Item} value=\"select-all\"\u003e\n            Select All\n          \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.Item className={styles.Item} value=\"deselect\"\u003e\n            Deselect\n          \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n        \u003c/Menu.ItemGroup\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.Content\u003e\n    \u003c/Menu.Positioner\u003e\n  \u003c/Menu.Root\u003e\n)\n\n```\n\n#### Solid\n\n```tsx\nimport { Menu } from '@ark-ui/solid/menu'\nimport { ChevronDownIcon } from 'lucide-solid'\nimport styles from 'styles/menu.module.css'\n\nexport const Group = () =\u003e (\n  \u003cMenu.Root\u003e\n    \u003cMenu.Trigger class={styles.Trigger}\u003e\n      Edit\n      \u003cMenu.Indicator class={styles.Indicator}\u003e\n        \u003cChevronDownIcon /\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.Indicator\u003e\n    \u003c/Menu.Trigger\u003e\n    \u003cMenu.Positioner\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.Content class={styles.Content}\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.ItemGroup class={styles.ItemGroup}\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.ItemGroupLabel class={styles.ItemGroupLabel}\u003eClipboard\u003c/Menu.ItemGroupLabel\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"cut\"\u003e\n            Cut\n          \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"copy\"\u003e\n            Copy\n          \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"paste\"\u003e\n            Paste\n          \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n        \u003c/Menu.ItemGroup\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.ItemGroup class={styles.ItemGroup}\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.ItemGroupLabel class={styles.ItemGroupLabel}\u003eSelection\u003c/Menu.ItemGroupLabel\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"select-all\"\u003e\n            Select All\n          \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"deselect\"\u003e\n            Deselect\n          \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n        \u003c/Menu.ItemGroup\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.Content\u003e\n    \u003c/Menu.Positioner\u003e\n  \u003c/Menu.Root\u003e\n)\n\n```\n\n#### Vue\n\n```vue\n\u003cscript setup lang=\"ts\"\u003e\nimport { Menu } from '@ark-ui/vue/menu'\nimport { ChevronDownIcon } from 'lucide-vue-next'\nimport styles from 'styles/menu.module.css'\n\u003c/script\u003e\n\n\u003ctemplate\u003e\n  \u003cMenu.Root\u003e\n    \u003cMenu.Trigger :class=\"styles.Trigger\"\u003e\n      Edit\n      \u003cMenu.Indicator :class=\"styles.Indicator\"\u003e\n        \u003cChevronDownIcon /\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.Indicator\u003e\n    \u003c/Menu.Trigger\u003e\n    \u003cMenu.Positioner\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.Content :class=\"styles.Content\"\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.ItemGroup :class=\"styles.ItemGroup\"\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.ItemGroupLabel :class=\"styles.ItemGroupLabel\"\u003eClipboard\u003c/Menu.ItemGroupLabel\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.Item :class=\"styles.Item\" value=\"cut\"\u003eCut\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.Item :class=\"styles.Item\" value=\"copy\"\u003eCopy\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.Item :class=\"styles.Item\" value=\"paste\"\u003ePaste\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n        \u003c/Menu.ItemGroup\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.ItemGroup :class=\"styles.ItemGroup\"\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.ItemGroupLabel :class=\"styles.ItemGroupLabel\"\u003eSelection\u003c/Menu.ItemGroupLabel\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.Item :class=\"styles.Item\" value=\"select-all\"\u003eSelect All\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.Item :class=\"styles.Item\" value=\"deselect\"\u003eDeselect\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n        \u003c/Menu.ItemGroup\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.Content\u003e\n    \u003c/Menu.Positioner\u003e\n  \u003c/Menu.Root\u003e\n\u003c/template\u003e\n\n```\n\n#### Svelte\n\n```svelte\n\u003cscript lang=\"ts\"\u003e\n  import { Menu } from '@ark-ui/svelte/menu'\n  import { ChevronDownIcon } from 'lucide-svelte'\n  import styles from 'styles/menu.module.css'\n\u003c/script\u003e\n\n\u003cMenu.Root\u003e\n  \u003cMenu.Trigger class={styles.Trigger}\u003e\n    Edit\n    \u003cMenu.Indicator class={styles.Indicator}\u003e\n      \u003cChevronDownIcon /\u003e\n    \u003c/Menu.Indicator\u003e\n  \u003c/Menu.Trigger\u003e\n  \u003cMenu.Positioner\u003e\n    \u003cMenu.Content class={styles.Content}\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.ItemGroup class={styles.ItemGroup}\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.ItemGroupLabel class={styles.ItemGroupLabel}\u003eClipboard\u003c/Menu.ItemGroupLabel\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"cut\"\u003eCut\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"copy\"\u003eCopy\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"paste\"\u003ePaste\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.ItemGroup\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.ItemGroup class={styles.ItemGroup}\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.ItemGroupLabel class={styles.ItemGroupLabel}\u003eSelection\u003c/Menu.ItemGroupLabel\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"select-all\"\u003eSelect All\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"deselect\"\u003eDeselect\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.ItemGroup\u003e\n    \u003c/Menu.Content\u003e\n  \u003c/Menu.Positioner\u003e\n\u003c/Menu.Root\u003e\n\n```\n\n### Links\n\nTo render menu items as links, use the `asChild` prop to replace the default element with an anchor tag.\n\n**Example: links**\n\n#### React\n\n```tsx\nimport { Menu } from '@ark-ui/react/menu'\nimport { ChevronDownIcon } from 'lucide-react'\nimport styles from 'styles/menu.module.css'\n\nexport const Links = () =\u003e (\n  \u003cMenu.Root\u003e\n    \u003cMenu.Trigger className={styles.Trigger}\u003e\n      Help\n      \u003cMenu.Indicator className={styles.Indicator}\u003e\n        \u003cChevronDownIcon /\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.Indicator\u003e\n    \u003c/Menu.Trigger\u003e\n    \u003cMenu.Positioner\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.Content className={styles.Content}\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Item className={styles.Item} value=\"docs\" asChild\u003e\n          \u003ca href=\"https://ark-ui.com\"\u003eDocumentation\u003c/a\u003e\n        \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Item className={styles.Item} value=\"github\" asChild\u003e\n          \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/chakra-ui/ark\"\u003eGitHub\u003c/a\u003e\n        \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Separator className={styles.Separator} /\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Item className={styles.Item} value=\"changelog\" asChild\u003e\n          \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/chakra-ui/ark/releases\"\u003eChangelog\u003c/a\u003e\n        \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.Content\u003e\n    \u003c/Menu.Positioner\u003e\n  \u003c/Menu.Root\u003e\n)\n\n```\n\n#### Solid\n\n```tsx\nimport { Menu } from '@ark-ui/solid/menu'\nimport { ChevronDownIcon } from 'lucide-solid'\nimport styles from 'styles/menu.module.css'\n\nexport const Links = () =\u003e (\n  \u003cMenu.Root\u003e\n    \u003cMenu.Trigger class={styles.Trigger}\u003e\n      Help\n      \u003cMenu.Indicator class={styles.Indicator}\u003e\n        \u003cChevronDownIcon /\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.Indicator\u003e\n    \u003c/Menu.Trigger\u003e\n    \u003cMenu.Positioner\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.Content class={styles.Content}\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"docs\" asChild={(props) =\u003e \u003ca href=\"https://ark-ui.com\" {...props()} /\u003e}\u003e\n          Documentation\n        \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Item\n          class={styles.Item}\n          value=\"github\"\n          asChild={(props) =\u003e \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/chakra-ui/ark\" {...props()} /\u003e}\n        \u003e\n          GitHub\n        \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Separator class={styles.Separator} /\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Item\n          class={styles.Item}\n          value=\"changelog\"\n          asChild={(props) =\u003e \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/chakra-ui/ark/releases\" {...props()} /\u003e}\n        \u003e\n          Changelog\n        \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.Content\u003e\n    \u003c/Menu.Positioner\u003e\n  \u003c/Menu.Root\u003e\n)\n\n```\n\n#### Vue\n\n```vue\n\u003cscript setup lang=\"ts\"\u003e\nimport { Menu } from '@ark-ui/vue/menu'\nimport { ChevronDownIcon } from 'lucide-vue-next'\nimport styles from 'styles/menu.module.css'\n\u003c/script\u003e\n\n\u003ctemplate\u003e\n  \u003cMenu.Root\u003e\n    \u003cMenu.Trigger :class=\"styles.Trigger\"\u003e\n      Help\n      \u003cMenu.Indicator :class=\"styles.Indicator\"\u003e\n        \u003cChevronDownIcon /\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.Indicator\u003e\n    \u003c/Menu.Trigger\u003e\n    \u003cMenu.Positioner\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.Content :class=\"styles.Content\"\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Item :class=\"styles.Item\" value=\"docs\" as-child\u003e\n          \u003ca href=\"https://ark-ui.com\"\u003eDocumentation\u003c/a\u003e\n        \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Item :class=\"styles.Item\" value=\"github\" as-child\u003e\n          \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/chakra-ui/ark\"\u003eGitHub\u003c/a\u003e\n        \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Separator :class=\"styles.Separator\" /\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Item :class=\"styles.Item\" value=\"changelog\" as-child\u003e\n          \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/chakra-ui/ark/releases\"\u003eChangelog\u003c/a\u003e\n        \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.Content\u003e\n    \u003c/Menu.Positioner\u003e\n  \u003c/Menu.Root\u003e\n\u003c/template\u003e\n\n```\n\n#### Svelte\n\n```svelte\n\u003cscript lang=\"ts\"\u003e\n  import { Menu } from '@ark-ui/svelte/menu'\n  import { ChevronDownIcon } from 'lucide-svelte'\n  import styles from 'styles/menu.module.css'\n\u003c/script\u003e\n\n\u003cMenu.Root\u003e\n  \u003cMenu.Trigger class={styles.Trigger}\u003e\n    Help\n    \u003cMenu.Indicator class={styles.Indicator}\u003e\n      \u003cChevronDownIcon /\u003e\n    \u003c/Menu.Indicator\u003e\n  \u003c/Menu.Trigger\u003e\n  \u003cMenu.Positioner\u003e\n    \u003cMenu.Content class={styles.Content}\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"docs\"\u003e\n        {#snippet asChild(itemProps)}\n          \u003ca href=\"https://ark-ui.com\" {...itemProps()}\u003eDocumentation\u003c/a\u003e\n        {/snippet}\n      \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"github\"\u003e\n        {#snippet asChild(itemProps)}\n          \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/chakra-ui/ark\" {...itemProps()}\u003eGitHub\u003c/a\u003e\n        {/snippet}\n      \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.Separator class={styles.Separator} /\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"changelog\"\u003e\n        {#snippet asChild(itemProps)}\n          \u003ca href=\"https://github.com/chakra-ui/ark/releases\" {...itemProps()}\u003eChangelog\u003c/a\u003e\n        {/snippet}\n      \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n    \u003c/Menu.Content\u003e\n  \u003c/Menu.Positioner\u003e\n\u003c/Menu.Root\u003e\n\n```\n\n### Checkbox\n\nTo add a checkbox to a menu item, use the `Menu.Checkbox` component.\n\n**Example: checkbox-items**\n\n#### React\n\n```tsx\nimport { Menu } from '@ark-ui/react/menu'\nimport { CheckIcon, ChevronDownIcon } from 'lucide-react'\nimport { useState } from 'react'\nimport styles from 'styles/menu.module.css'\n\nexport const CheckboxItems = () =\u003e {\n  const [showToolbar, setShowToolbar] = useState(true)\n  const [showStatusBar, setShowStatusBar] = useState(false)\n\n  return (\n    \u003cMenu.Root\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.Trigger className={styles.Trigger}\u003e\n        View\n        \u003cMenu.Indicator className={styles.Indicator}\u003e\n          \u003cChevronDownIcon /\u003e\n        \u003c/Menu.Indicator\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.Trigger\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.Positioner\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Content className={styles.Content}\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.CheckboxItem\n            className={styles.CheckboxItem}\n            checked={showToolbar}\n            onCheckedChange={setShowToolbar}\n            value=\"toolbar\"\n          \u003e\n            \u003cMenu.ItemIndicator className={styles.ItemIndicator}\u003e\n              \u003cCheckIcon /\u003e\n            \u003c/Menu.ItemIndicator\u003e\n            \u003cMenu.ItemText className={styles.ItemText}\u003eShow Toolbar\u003c/Menu.ItemText\u003e\n          \u003c/Menu.CheckboxItem\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.CheckboxItem\n            className={styles.CheckboxItem}\n            checked={showStatusBar}\n            onCheckedChange={setShowStatusBar}\n            value=\"status-bar\"\n          \u003e\n            \u003cMenu.ItemIndicator className={styles.ItemIndicator}\u003e\n              \u003cCheckIcon /\u003e\n            \u003c/Menu.ItemIndicator\u003e\n            \u003cMenu.ItemText className={styles.ItemText}\u003eShow Status Bar\u003c/Menu.ItemText\u003e\n          \u003c/Menu.CheckboxItem\u003e\n        \u003c/Menu.Content\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.Positioner\u003e\n    \u003c/Menu.Root\u003e\n  )\n}\n\n```\n\n#### Solid\n\n```tsx\nimport { Menu } from '@ark-ui/solid/menu'\nimport { CheckIcon, ChevronDownIcon } from 'lucide-solid'\nimport { createSignal } from 'solid-js'\nimport styles from 'styles/menu.module.css'\n\nexport const CheckboxItems = () =\u003e {\n  const [showToolbar, setShowToolbar] = createSignal(true)\n  const [showStatusBar, setShowStatusBar] = createSignal(false)\n\n  return (\n    \u003cMenu.Root\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.Trigger class={styles.Trigger}\u003e\n        View\n        \u003cMenu.Indicator class={styles.Indicator}\u003e\n          \u003cChevronDownIcon /\u003e\n        \u003c/Menu.Indicator\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.Trigger\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.Positioner\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Content class={styles.Content}\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.CheckboxItem\n            class={styles.CheckboxItem}\n            checked={showToolbar()}\n            onCheckedChange={setShowToolbar}\n            value=\"toolbar\"\n          \u003e\n            \u003cMenu.ItemIndicator class={styles.ItemIndicator}\u003e\n              \u003cCheckIcon /\u003e\n            \u003c/Menu.ItemIndicator\u003e\n            \u003cMenu.ItemText class={styles.ItemText}\u003eShow Toolbar\u003c/Menu.ItemText\u003e\n          \u003c/Menu.CheckboxItem\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.CheckboxItem\n            class={styles.CheckboxItem}\n            checked={showStatusBar()}\n            onCheckedChange={setShowStatusBar}\n            value=\"status-bar\"\n          \u003e\n            \u003cMenu.ItemIndicator class={styles.ItemIndicator}\u003e\n              \u003cCheckIcon /\u003e\n            \u003c/Menu.ItemIndicator\u003e\n            \u003cMenu.ItemText class={styles.ItemText}\u003eShow Status Bar\u003c/Menu.ItemText\u003e\n          \u003c/Menu.CheckboxItem\u003e\n        \u003c/Menu.Content\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.Positioner\u003e\n    \u003c/Menu.Root\u003e\n  )\n}\n\n```\n\n#### Vue\n\n```vue\n\u003cscript setup lang=\"ts\"\u003e\nimport { Menu } from '@ark-ui/vue/menu'\nimport { CheckIcon, ChevronDownIcon } from 'lucide-vue-next'\nimport { ref } from 'vue'\nimport styles from 'styles/menu.module.css'\n\nconst showToolbar = ref(true)\nconst showStatusBar = ref(false)\n\u003c/script\u003e\n\n\u003ctemplate\u003e\n  \u003cMenu.Root\u003e\n    \u003cMenu.Trigger :class=\"styles.Trigger\"\u003e\n      View\n      \u003cMenu.Indicator :class=\"styles.Indicator\"\u003e\n        \u003cChevronDownIcon /\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.Indicator\u003e\n    \u003c/Menu.Trigger\u003e\n    \u003cMenu.Positioner\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.Content :class=\"styles.Content\"\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.CheckboxItem :class=\"styles.CheckboxItem\" v-model:checked=\"showToolbar\" value=\"toolbar\"\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.ItemIndicator :class=\"styles.ItemIndicator\"\u003e\n            \u003cCheckIcon /\u003e\n          \u003c/Menu.ItemIndicator\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.ItemText :class=\"styles.ItemText\"\u003eShow Toolbar\u003c/Menu.ItemText\u003e\n        \u003c/Menu.CheckboxItem\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.CheckboxItem :class=\"styles.CheckboxItem\" v-model:checked=\"showStatusBar\" value=\"status-bar\"\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.ItemIndicator :class=\"styles.ItemIndicator\"\u003e\n            \u003cCheckIcon /\u003e\n          \u003c/Menu.ItemIndicator\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.ItemText :class=\"styles.ItemText\"\u003eShow Status Bar\u003c/Menu.ItemText\u003e\n        \u003c/Menu.CheckboxItem\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.Content\u003e\n    \u003c/Menu.Positioner\u003e\n  \u003c/Menu.Root\u003e\n\u003c/template\u003e\n\n```\n\n#### Svelte\n\n```svelte\n\u003cscript lang=\"ts\"\u003e\n  import { Menu } from '@ark-ui/svelte/menu'\n  import { CheckIcon, ChevronDownIcon } from 'lucide-svelte'\n  import styles from 'styles/menu.module.css'\n\n  let showToolbar = $state(true)\n  let showStatusBar = $state(false)\n\u003c/script\u003e\n\n\u003cMenu.Root\u003e\n  \u003cMenu.Trigger class={styles.Trigger}\u003e\n    View\n    \u003cMenu.Indicator class={styles.Indicator}\u003e\n      \u003cChevronDownIcon /\u003e\n    \u003c/Menu.Indicator\u003e\n  \u003c/Menu.Trigger\u003e\n  \u003cMenu.Positioner\u003e\n    \u003cMenu.Content class={styles.Content}\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.CheckboxItem class={styles.CheckboxItem} bind:checked={showToolbar} value=\"toolbar\"\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.ItemIndicator class={styles.ItemIndicator}\u003e\n          \u003cCheckIcon /\u003e\n        \u003c/Menu.ItemIndicator\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.ItemText class={styles.ItemText}\u003eShow Toolbar\u003c/Menu.ItemText\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.CheckboxItem\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.CheckboxItem class={styles.CheckboxItem} bind:checked={showStatusBar} value=\"status-bar\"\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.ItemIndicator class={styles.ItemIndicator}\u003e\n          \u003cCheckIcon /\u003e\n        \u003c/Menu.ItemIndicator\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.ItemText class={styles.ItemText}\u003eShow Status Bar\u003c/Menu.ItemText\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.CheckboxItem\u003e\n    \u003c/Menu.Content\u003e\n  \u003c/Menu.Positioner\u003e\n\u003c/Menu.Root\u003e\n\n```\n\n### Radio Group\n\nTo group radio option items, use the `Menu.RadioGroup` component.\n\n**Example: radio-items**\n\n#### React\n\n```tsx\nimport { Menu } from '@ark-ui/react/menu'\nimport { CheckIcon, ChevronDownIcon } from 'lucide-react'\nimport { useState } from 'react'\nimport styles from 'styles/menu.module.css'\n\nexport const RadioItems = () =\u003e {\n  const [sortBy, setSortBy] = useState('date')\n\n  return (\n    \u003cMenu.Root\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.Trigger className={styles.Trigger}\u003e\n        Sort\n        \u003cMenu.Indicator className={styles.Indicator}\u003e\n          \u003cChevronDownIcon /\u003e\n        \u003c/Menu.Indicator\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.Trigger\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.Positioner\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Content className={styles.Content}\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.RadioItemGroup className={styles.ItemGroup} value={sortBy} onValueChange={(e) =\u003e setSortBy(e.value)}\u003e\n            \u003cMenu.ItemGroupLabel className={styles.ItemGroupLabel}\u003eSort By\u003c/Menu.ItemGroupLabel\u003e\n            \u003cMenu.RadioItem className={styles.RadioItem} value=\"name\"\u003e\n              \u003cMenu.ItemIndicator className={styles.ItemIndicator}\u003e\n                \u003cCheckIcon /\u003e\n              \u003c/Menu.ItemIndicator\u003e\n              \u003cMenu.ItemText className={styles.ItemText}\u003eName\u003c/Menu.ItemText\u003e\n            \u003c/Menu.RadioItem\u003e\n            \u003cMenu.RadioItem className={styles.RadioItem} value=\"date\"\u003e\n              \u003cMenu.ItemIndicator className={styles.ItemIndicator}\u003e\n                \u003cCheckIcon /\u003e\n              \u003c/Menu.ItemIndicator\u003e\n              \u003cMenu.ItemText className={styles.ItemText}\u003eDate Modified\u003c/Menu.ItemText\u003e\n            \u003c/Menu.RadioItem\u003e\n            \u003cMenu.RadioItem className={styles.RadioItem} value=\"size\"\u003e\n              \u003cMenu.ItemIndicator className={styles.ItemIndicator}\u003e\n                \u003cCheckIcon /\u003e\n              \u003c/Menu.ItemIndicator\u003e\n              \u003cMenu.ItemText className={styles.ItemText}\u003eSize\u003c/Menu.ItemText\u003e\n            \u003c/Menu.RadioItem\u003e\n            \u003cMenu.RadioItem className={styles.RadioItem} value=\"type\"\u003e\n              \u003cMenu.ItemIndicator className={styles.ItemIndicator}\u003e\n                \u003cCheckIcon /\u003e\n              \u003c/Menu.ItemIndicator\u003e\n              \u003cMenu.ItemText className={styles.ItemText}\u003eType\u003c/Menu.ItemText\u003e\n            \u003c/Menu.RadioItem\u003e\n          \u003c/Menu.RadioItemGroup\u003e\n        \u003c/Menu.Content\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.Positioner\u003e\n    \u003c/Menu.Root\u003e\n  )\n}\n\n```\n\n#### Solid\n\n```tsx\nimport { Menu } from '@ark-ui/solid/menu'\nimport { CheckIcon, ChevronDownIcon } from 'lucide-solid'\nimport { createSignal } from 'solid-js'\nimport styles from 'styles/menu.module.css'\n\nexport const RadioItems = () =\u003e {\n  const [sortBy, setSortBy] = createSignal('date')\n\n  return (\n    \u003cMenu.Root\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.Trigger class={styles.Trigger}\u003e\n        Sort\n        \u003cMenu.Indicator class={styles.Indicator}\u003e\n          \u003cChevronDownIcon /\u003e\n        \u003c/Menu.Indicator\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.Trigger\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.Positioner\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Content class={styles.Content}\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.RadioItemGroup class={styles.ItemGroup} value={sortBy()} onValueChange={(e) =\u003e setSortBy(e.value)}\u003e\n            \u003cMenu.ItemGroupLabel class={styles.ItemGroupLabel}\u003eSort By\u003c/Menu.ItemGroupLabel\u003e\n            \u003cMenu.RadioItem class={styles.RadioItem} value=\"name\"\u003e\n              \u003cMenu.ItemIndicator class={styles.ItemIndicator}\u003e\n                \u003cCheckIcon /\u003e\n              \u003c/Menu.ItemIndicator\u003e\n              \u003cMenu.ItemText class={styles.ItemText}\u003eName\u003c/Menu.ItemText\u003e\n            \u003c/Menu.RadioItem\u003e\n            \u003cMenu.RadioItem class={styles.RadioItem} value=\"date\"\u003e\n              \u003cMenu.ItemIndicator class={styles.ItemIndicator}\u003e\n                \u003cCheckIcon /\u003e\n              \u003c/Menu.ItemIndicator\u003e\n              \u003cMenu.ItemText class={styles.ItemText}\u003eDate Modified\u003c/Menu.ItemText\u003e\n            \u003c/Menu.RadioItem\u003e\n            \u003cMenu.RadioItem class={styles.RadioItem} value=\"size\"\u003e\n              \u003cMenu.ItemIndicator class={styles.ItemIndicator}\u003e\n                \u003cCheckIcon /\u003e\n              \u003c/Menu.ItemIndicator\u003e\n              \u003cMenu.ItemText class={styles.ItemText}\u003eSize\u003c/Menu.ItemText\u003e\n            \u003c/Menu.RadioItem\u003e\n            \u003cMenu.RadioItem class={styles.RadioItem} value=\"type\"\u003e\n              \u003cMenu.ItemIndicator class={styles.ItemIndicator}\u003e\n                \u003cCheckIcon /\u003e\n              \u003c/Menu.ItemIndicator\u003e\n              \u003cMenu.ItemText class={styles.ItemText}\u003eType\u003c/Menu.ItemText\u003e\n            \u003c/Menu.RadioItem\u003e\n          \u003c/Menu.RadioItemGroup\u003e\n        \u003c/Menu.Content\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.Positioner\u003e\n    \u003c/Menu.Root\u003e\n  )\n}\n\n```\n\n#### Vue\n\n```vue\n\u003cscript setup lang=\"ts\"\u003e\nimport { Menu } from '@ark-ui/vue/menu'\nimport { CheckIcon, ChevronDownIcon } from 'lucide-vue-next'\nimport { ref } from 'vue'\nimport styles
