from 'styles/menu.module.css'\n\nconst sortBy = ref('date')\n\u003c/script\u003e\n\n\u003ctemplate\u003e\n  \u003cMenu.Root\u003e\n    \u003cMenu.Trigger :class=\"styles.Trigger\"\u003e\n      Sort\n      \u003cMenu.Indicator :class=\"styles.Indicator\"\u003e\n        \u003cChevronDownIcon /\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.Indicator\u003e\n    \u003c/Menu.Trigger\u003e\n    \u003cMenu.Positioner\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.Content :class=\"styles.Content\"\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.RadioItemGroup :class=\"styles.ItemGroup\" v-model=\"sortBy\"\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.ItemGroupLabel :class=\"styles.ItemGroupLabel\"\u003eSort By\u003c/Menu.ItemGroupLabel\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.RadioItem :class=\"styles.RadioItem\" value=\"name\"\u003e\n            \u003cMenu.ItemIndicator :class=\"styles.ItemIndicator\"\u003e\n              \u003cCheckIcon /\u003e\n            \u003c/Menu.ItemIndicator\u003e\n            \u003cMenu.ItemText :class=\"styles.ItemText\"\u003eName\u003c/Menu.ItemText\u003e\n          \u003c/Menu.RadioItem\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.RadioItem :class=\"styles.RadioItem\" value=\"date\"\u003e\n            \u003cMenu.ItemIndicator :class=\"styles.ItemIndicator\"\u003e\n              \u003cCheckIcon /\u003e\n            \u003c/Menu.ItemIndicator\u003e\n            \u003cMenu.ItemText :class=\"styles.ItemText\"\u003eDate Modified\u003c/Menu.ItemText\u003e\n          \u003c/Menu.RadioItem\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.RadioItem :class=\"styles.RadioItem\" value=\"size\"\u003e\n            \u003cMenu.ItemIndicator :class=\"styles.ItemIndicator\"\u003e\n              \u003cCheckIcon /\u003e\n            \u003c/Menu.ItemIndicator\u003e\n            \u003cMenu.ItemText :class=\"styles.ItemText\"\u003eSize\u003c/Menu.ItemText\u003e\n          \u003c/Menu.RadioItem\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.RadioItem :class=\"styles.RadioItem\" value=\"type\"\u003e\n            \u003cMenu.ItemIndicator :class=\"styles.ItemIndicator\"\u003e\n              \u003cCheckIcon /\u003e\n            \u003c/Menu.ItemIndicator\u003e\n            \u003cMenu.ItemText :class=\"styles.ItemText\"\u003eType\u003c/Menu.ItemText\u003e\n          \u003c/Menu.RadioItem\u003e\n        \u003c/Menu.RadioItemGroup\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.Content\u003e\n    \u003c/Menu.Positioner\u003e\n  \u003c/Menu.Root\u003e\n\u003c/template\u003e\n\n```\n\n#### Svelte\n\n```svelte\n\u003cscript lang=\"ts\"\u003e\n  import { Menu } from '@ark-ui/svelte/menu'\n  import { CheckIcon, ChevronDownIcon } from 'lucide-svelte'\n  import styles from 'styles/menu.module.css'\n\n  let sortBy = $state('date')\n\u003c/script\u003e\n\n\u003cMenu.Root\u003e\n  \u003cMenu.Trigger class={styles.Trigger}\u003e\n    Sort\n    \u003cMenu.Indicator class={styles.Indicator}\u003e\n      \u003cChevronDownIcon /\u003e\n    \u003c/Menu.Indicator\u003e\n  \u003c/Menu.Trigger\u003e\n  \u003cMenu.Positioner\u003e\n    \u003cMenu.Content class={styles.Content}\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.RadioItemGroup class={styles.ItemGroup} bind:value={sortBy}\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.ItemGroupLabel class={styles.ItemGroupLabel}\u003eSort By\u003c/Menu.ItemGroupLabel\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.RadioItem class={styles.RadioItem} value=\"name\"\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.ItemIndicator class={styles.ItemIndicator}\u003e\n            \u003cCheckIcon /\u003e\n          \u003c/Menu.ItemIndicator\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.ItemText class={styles.ItemText}\u003eName\u003c/Menu.ItemText\u003e\n        \u003c/Menu.RadioItem\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.RadioItem class={styles.RadioItem} value=\"date\"\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.ItemIndicator class={styles.ItemIndicator}\u003e\n            \u003cCheckIcon /\u003e\n          \u003c/Menu.ItemIndicator\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.ItemText class={styles.ItemText}\u003eDate Modified\u003c/Menu.ItemText\u003e\n        \u003c/Menu.RadioItem\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.RadioItem class={styles.RadioItem} value=\"size\"\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.ItemIndicator class={styles.ItemIndicator}\u003e\n            \u003cCheckIcon /\u003e\n          \u003c/Menu.ItemIndicator\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.ItemText class={styles.ItemText}\u003eSize\u003c/Menu.ItemText\u003e\n        \u003c/Menu.RadioItem\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.RadioItem class={styles.RadioItem} value=\"type\"\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.ItemIndicator class={styles.ItemIndicator}\u003e\n            \u003cCheckIcon /\u003e\n          \u003c/Menu.ItemIndicator\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.ItemText class={styles.ItemText}\u003eType\u003c/Menu.ItemText\u003e\n        \u003c/Menu.RadioItem\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.RadioItemGroup\u003e\n    \u003c/Menu.Content\u003e\n  \u003c/Menu.Positioner\u003e\n\u003c/Menu.Root\u003e\n\n```\n\n### Context Menu\n\nTo show the menu when a trigger element is right-clicked, use the `Menu.ContextTrigger` component.\n\nContext menus are also opened during a long-press of roughly `700ms` when the pointer is pen or touch.\n\n**Example: context**\n\n#### React\n\n```tsx\nimport { Menu } from '@ark-ui/react/menu'\nimport styles from 'styles/menu.module.css'\n\nexport const Context = () =\u003e (\n  \u003cMenu.Root\u003e\n    \u003cMenu.ContextTrigger className={styles.ContextTrigger}\u003eRight click here\u003c/Menu.ContextTrigger\u003e\n    \u003cMenu.Positioner\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.Content className={styles.Content}\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Item className={styles.Item} value=\"cut\"\u003e\n          Cut\n        \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Item className={styles.Item} value=\"copy\"\u003e\n          Copy\n        \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Item className={styles.Item} value=\"paste\"\u003e\n          Paste\n        \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Separator className={styles.Separator} /\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Item className={styles.Item} value=\"delete\"\u003e\n          Delete\n        \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.Content\u003e\n    \u003c/Menu.Positioner\u003e\n  \u003c/Menu.Root\u003e\n)\n\n```\n\n#### Solid\n\n```tsx\nimport { Menu } from '@ark-ui/solid/menu'\nimport styles from 'styles/menu.module.css'\n\nexport const Context = () =\u003e (\n  \u003cMenu.Root\u003e\n    \u003cMenu.ContextTrigger class={styles.ContextTrigger}\u003eRight click here\u003c/Menu.ContextTrigger\u003e\n    \u003cMenu.Positioner\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.Content class={styles.Content}\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"cut\"\u003e\n          Cut\n        \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"copy\"\u003e\n          Copy\n        \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"paste\"\u003e\n          Paste\n        \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Separator class={styles.Separator} /\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"delete\"\u003e\n          Delete\n        \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.Content\u003e\n    \u003c/Menu.Positioner\u003e\n  \u003c/Menu.Root\u003e\n)\n\n```\n\n#### Vue\n\n```vue\n\u003cscript setup lang=\"ts\"\u003e\nimport { Menu } from '@ark-ui/vue/menu'\nimport styles from 'styles/menu.module.css'\n\u003c/script\u003e\n\n\u003ctemplate\u003e\n  \u003cMenu.Root\u003e\n    \u003cMenu.ContextTrigger :class=\"styles.ContextTrigger\"\u003eRight click here\u003c/Menu.ContextTrigger\u003e\n    \u003cMenu.Positioner\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.Content :class=\"styles.Content\"\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Item :class=\"styles.Item\" value=\"cut\"\u003eCut\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Item :class=\"styles.Item\" value=\"copy\"\u003eCopy\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Item :class=\"styles.Item\" value=\"paste\"\u003ePaste\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Separator :class=\"styles.Separator\" /\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Item :class=\"styles.Item\" value=\"delete\"\u003eDelete\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.Content\u003e\n    \u003c/Menu.Positioner\u003e\n  \u003c/Menu.Root\u003e\n\u003c/template\u003e\n\n```\n\n#### Svelte\n\n```svelte\n\u003cscript lang=\"ts\"\u003e\n  import { Menu } from '@ark-ui/svelte/menu'\n  import styles from 'styles/menu.module.css'\n\u003c/script\u003e\n\n\u003cMenu.Root\u003e\n  \u003cMenu.ContextTrigger class={styles.ContextTrigger}\u003eRight click here\u003c/Menu.ContextTrigger\u003e\n  \u003cMenu.Positioner\u003e\n    \u003cMenu.Content class={styles.Content}\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"cut\"\u003eCut\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"copy\"\u003eCopy\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"paste\"\u003ePaste\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.Separator class={styles.Separator} /\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"delete\"\u003eDelete\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n    \u003c/Menu.Content\u003e\n  \u003c/Menu.Positioner\u003e\n\u003c/Menu.Root\u003e\n\n```\n\n### Nested\n\nTo show a nested menu, render another `Menu` component and use the `Menu.TriggerItem` component to open the submenu.\n\n**Example: nested**\n\n#### React\n\n```tsx\nimport { Menu } from '@ark-ui/react/menu'\nimport { Portal } from '@ark-ui/react/portal'\nimport { ChevronDownIcon } from 'lucide-react'\nimport styles from 'styles/menu.module.css'\n\nexport const Nested = () =\u003e (\n  \u003cMenu.Root\u003e\n    \u003cMenu.Trigger className={styles.Trigger}\u003e\n      File\n      \u003cMenu.Indicator className={styles.Indicator}\u003e\n        \u003cChevronDownIcon /\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.Indicator\u003e\n    \u003c/Menu.Trigger\u003e\n    \u003cPortal\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.Positioner\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Content className={styles.Content}\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.Item className={styles.Item} value=\"new\"\u003e\n            New File\n          \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.Item className={styles.Item} value=\"open\"\u003e\n            Open...\n          \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.Separator className={styles.Separator} /\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.Root\u003e\n            \u003cMenu.TriggerItem className={styles.TriggerItem}\u003eShare\u003c/Menu.TriggerItem\u003e\n            \u003cPortal\u003e\n              \u003cMenu.Positioner\u003e\n                \u003cMenu.Content className={styles.Content}\u003e\n                  \u003cMenu.Item className={styles.Item} value=\"email\"\u003e\n                    Email\n                  \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n                  \u003cMenu.Item className={styles.Item} value=\"message\"\u003e\n                    Message\n                  \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n                  \u003cMenu.Item className={styles.Item} value=\"airdrop\"\u003e\n                    AirDrop\n                  \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n                \u003c/Menu.Content\u003e\n              \u003c/Menu.Positioner\u003e\n            \u003c/Portal\u003e\n          \u003c/Menu.Root\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.Root\u003e\n            \u003cMenu.TriggerItem className={styles.TriggerItem}\u003eExport\u003c/Menu.TriggerItem\u003e\n            \u003cPortal\u003e\n              \u003cMenu.Positioner\u003e\n                \u003cMenu.Content className={styles.Content}\u003e\n                  \u003cMenu.Item className={styles.Item} value=\"pdf\"\u003e\n                    PDF\n                  \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n                  \u003cMenu.Item className={styles.Item} value=\"png\"\u003e\n                    PNG\n                  \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n                  \u003cMenu.Item className={styles.Item} value=\"svg\"\u003e\n                    SVG\n                  \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n                \u003c/Menu.Content\u003e\n              \u003c/Menu.Positioner\u003e\n            \u003c/Portal\u003e\n          \u003c/Menu.Root\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.Separator className={styles.Separator} /\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.Item className={styles.Item} value=\"print\"\u003e\n            Print...\n          \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n        \u003c/Menu.Content\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.Positioner\u003e\n    \u003c/Portal\u003e\n  \u003c/Menu.Root\u003e\n)\n\n```\n\n#### Solid\n\n```tsx\nimport { Menu } from '@ark-ui/solid/menu'\nimport { ChevronDownIcon } from 'lucide-solid'\nimport { Portal } from 'solid-js/web'\nimport styles from 'styles/menu.module.css'\n\nexport const Nested = () =\u003e (\n  \u003cMenu.Root\u003e\n    \u003cMenu.Trigger class={styles.Trigger}\u003e\n      File\n      \u003cMenu.Indicator class={styles.Indicator}\u003e\n        \u003cChevronDownIcon /\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.Indicator\u003e\n    \u003c/Menu.Trigger\u003e\n    \u003cPortal\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.Positioner\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Content class={styles.Content}\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"new\"\u003e\n            New File\n          \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"open\"\u003e\n            Open...\n          \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.Separator class={styles.Separator} /\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.Root\u003e\n            \u003cMenu.TriggerItem class={styles.TriggerItem}\u003eShare\u003c/Menu.TriggerItem\u003e\n            \u003cPortal\u003e\n              \u003cMenu.Positioner\u003e\n                \u003cMenu.Content class={styles.Content}\u003e\n                  \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"email\"\u003e\n                    Email\n                  \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n                  \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"message\"\u003e\n                    Message\n                  \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n                  \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"airdrop\"\u003e\n                    AirDrop\n                  \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n                \u003c/Menu.Content\u003e\n              \u003c/Menu.Positioner\u003e\n            \u003c/Portal\u003e\n          \u003c/Menu.Root\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.Root\u003e\n            \u003cMenu.TriggerItem class={styles.TriggerItem}\u003eExport\u003c/Menu.TriggerItem\u003e\n            \u003cPortal\u003e\n              \u003cMenu.Positioner\u003e\n                \u003cMenu.Content class={styles.Content}\u003e\n                  \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"pdf\"\u003e\n                    PDF\n                  \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n                  \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"png\"\u003e\n                    PNG\n                  \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n                  \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"svg\"\u003e\n                    SVG\n                  \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n                \u003c/Menu.Content\u003e\n              \u003c/Menu.Positioner\u003e\n            \u003c/Portal\u003e\n          \u003c/Menu.Root\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.Separator class={styles.Separator} /\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"print\"\u003e\n            Print...\n          \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n        \u003c/Menu.Content\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.Positioner\u003e\n    \u003c/Portal\u003e\n  \u003c/Menu.Root\u003e\n)\n\n```\n\n#### Vue\n\n```vue\n\u003cscript setup lang=\"ts\"\u003e\nimport { Menu } from '@ark-ui/vue/menu'\nimport { ChevronDownIcon } from 'lucide-vue-next'\nimport { Teleport } from 'vue'\nimport styles from 'styles/menu.module.css'\n\u003c/script\u003e\n\n\u003ctemplate\u003e\n  \u003cMenu.Root\u003e\n    \u003cMenu.Trigger :class=\"styles.Trigger\"\u003e\n      File\n      \u003cMenu.Indicator :class=\"styles.Indicator\"\u003e\n        \u003cChevronDownIcon /\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.Indicator\u003e\n    \u003c/Menu.Trigger\u003e\n    \u003cTeleport to=\"body\"\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.Positioner\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Content :class=\"styles.Content\"\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.Item :class=\"styles.Item\" value=\"new\"\u003eNew File\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.Item :class=\"styles.Item\" value=\"open\"\u003eOpen...\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.Separator :class=\"styles.Separator\" /\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.Root\u003e\n            \u003cMenu.TriggerItem :class=\"styles.TriggerItem\"\u003eShare\u003c/Menu.TriggerItem\u003e\n            \u003cTeleport to=\"body\"\u003e\n              \u003cMenu.Positioner\u003e\n                \u003cMenu.Content :class=\"styles.Content\"\u003e\n                  \u003cMenu.Item :class=\"styles.Item\" value=\"email\"\u003eEmail\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n                  \u003cMenu.Item :class=\"styles.Item\" value=\"message\"\u003eMessage\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n                  \u003cMenu.Item :class=\"styles.Item\" value=\"airdrop\"\u003eAirDrop\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n                \u003c/Menu.Content\u003e\n              \u003c/Menu.Positioner\u003e\n            \u003c/Teleport\u003e\n          \u003c/Menu.Root\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.Root\u003e\n            \u003cMenu.TriggerItem :class=\"styles.TriggerItem\"\u003eExport\u003c/Menu.TriggerItem\u003e\n            \u003cTeleport to=\"body\"\u003e\n              \u003cMenu.Positioner\u003e\n                \u003cMenu.Content :class=\"styles.Content\"\u003e\n                  \u003cMenu.Item :class=\"styles.Item\" value=\"pdf\"\u003ePDF\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n                  \u003cMenu.Item :class=\"styles.Item\" value=\"png\"\u003ePNG\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n                  \u003cMenu.Item :class=\"styles.Item\" value=\"svg\"\u003eSVG\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n                \u003c/Menu.Content\u003e\n              \u003c/Menu.Positioner\u003e\n            \u003c/Teleport\u003e\n          \u003c/Menu.Root\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.Separator :class=\"styles.Separator\" /\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.Item :class=\"styles.Item\" value=\"print\"\u003ePrint...\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n        \u003c/Menu.Content\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.Positioner\u003e\n    \u003c/Teleport\u003e\n  \u003c/Menu.Root\u003e\n\u003c/template\u003e\n\n```\n\n#### Svelte\n\n```svelte\n\u003cscript lang=\"ts\"\u003e\n  import { Menu } from '@ark-ui/svelte/menu'\n  import { Portal } from '@ark-ui/svelte/portal'\n  import { ChevronDownIcon } from 'lucide-svelte'\n  import styles from 'styles/menu.module.css'\n\u003c/script\u003e\n\n\u003cMenu.Root\u003e\n  \u003cMenu.Trigger class={styles.Trigger}\u003e\n    File\n    \u003cMenu.Indicator class={styles.Indicator}\u003e\n      \u003cChevronDownIcon /\u003e\n    \u003c/Menu.Indicator\u003e\n  \u003c/Menu.Trigger\u003e\n  \u003cPortal\u003e\n    \u003cMenu.Positioner\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.Content class={styles.Content}\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"new\"\u003eNew File\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"open\"\u003eOpen...\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Separator class={styles.Separator} /\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Root\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.TriggerItem class={styles.TriggerItem}\u003eShare\u003c/Menu.TriggerItem\u003e\n          \u003cPortal\u003e\n            \u003cMenu.Positioner\u003e\n              \u003cMenu.Content class={styles.Content}\u003e\n                \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"email\"\u003eEmail\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n                \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"message\"\u003eMessage\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n                \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"airdrop\"\u003eAirDrop\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n              \u003c/Menu.Content\u003e\n            \u003c/Menu.Positioner\u003e\n          \u003c/Portal\u003e\n        \u003c/Menu.Root\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Root\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.TriggerItem class={styles.TriggerItem}\u003eExport\u003c/Menu.TriggerItem\u003e\n          \u003cPortal\u003e\n            \u003cMenu.Positioner\u003e\n              \u003cMenu.Content class={styles.Content}\u003e\n                \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"pdf\"\u003ePDF\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n                \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"png\"\u003ePNG\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n                \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"svg\"\u003eSVG\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n              \u003c/Menu.Content\u003e\n            \u003c/Menu.Positioner\u003e\n          \u003c/Portal\u003e\n        \u003c/Menu.Root\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Separator class={styles.Separator} /\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"print\"\u003ePrint...\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.Content\u003e\n    \u003c/Menu.Positioner\u003e\n  \u003c/Portal\u003e\n\u003c/Menu.Root\u003e\n\n```\n\n### Menu in Dialog\n\nWhen rendering a menu inside a dialog, use `lazyMount` and `unmountOnExit` to ensure proper cleanup when the dialog\ncloses.\n\n**Example: menu-in-dialog**\n\n#### React\n\n```tsx\nimport { Dialog } from '@ark-ui/react/dialog'\nimport { Menu } from '@ark-ui/react/menu'\nimport { Portal } from '@ark-ui/react/portal'\nimport { ChevronDownIcon, XIcon } from 'lucide-react'\nimport button from 'styles/button.module.css'\nimport dialog from 'styles/dialog.module.css'\nimport styles from 'styles/menu.module.css'\n\nexport const MenuInDialog = () =\u003e (\n  \u003cDialog.Root\u003e\n    \u003cDialog.Trigger className={button.Root}\u003eOpen Dialog\u003c/Dialog.Trigger\u003e\n    \u003cPortal\u003e\n      \u003cDialog.Backdrop className={dialog.Backdrop} /\u003e\n      \u003cDialog.Positioner className={dialog.Positioner}\u003e\n        \u003cDialog.Content className={dialog.Content}\u003e\n          \u003cDialog.Title className={dialog.Title}\u003eSettings\u003c/Dialog.Title\u003e\n          \u003cDialog.Description className={dialog.Description}\u003eConfigure your preferences below.\u003c/Dialog.Description\u003e\n          \u003cDialog.CloseTrigger className={dialog.CloseTrigger}\u003e\n            \u003cXIcon /\u003e\n          \u003c/Dialog.CloseTrigger\u003e\n          \u003cdiv className={dialog.Body}\u003e\n            \u003cMenu.Root lazyMount unmountOnExit\u003e\n              \u003cMenu.Trigger className={styles.Trigger}\u003e\n                Select theme\n                \u003cMenu.Indicator className={styles.Indicator}\u003e\n                  \u003cChevronDownIcon /\u003e\n                \u003c/Menu.Indicator\u003e\n              \u003c/Menu.Trigger\u003e\n              \u003cPortal\u003e\n                \u003cMenu.Positioner\u003e\n                  \u003cMenu.Content className={styles.Content}\u003e\n                    \u003cMenu.Arrow className={styles.Arrow}\u003e\n                      \u003cMenu.ArrowTip className={styles.ArrowTip} /\u003e\n                    \u003c/Menu.Arrow\u003e\n                    \u003cMenu.Item className={styles.Item} value=\"light\"\u003e\n                      Light\n                    \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n                    \u003cMenu.Item className={styles.Item} value=\"dark\"\u003e\n                      Dark\n                    \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n                    \u003cMenu.Item className={styles.Item} value=\"system\"\u003e\n                      System\n                    \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n                  \u003c/Menu.Content\u003e\n                \u003c/Menu.Positioner\u003e\n              \u003c/Portal\u003e\n            \u003c/Menu.Root\u003e\n          \u003c/div\u003e\n        \u003c/Dialog.Content\u003e\n      \u003c/Dialog.Positioner\u003e\n    \u003c/Portal\u003e\n  \u003c/Dialog.Root\u003e\n)\n\n```\n\n#### Solid\n\n```tsx\nimport { Dialog } from '@ark-ui/solid/dialog'\nimport { Menu } from '@ark-ui/solid/menu'\nimport { ChevronDownIcon, XIcon } from 'lucide-solid'\nimport { Portal } from 'solid-js/web'\nimport button from 'styles/button.module.css'\nimport dialog from 'styles/dialog.module.css'\nimport styles from 'styles/menu.module.css'\n\nexport const MenuInDialog = () =\u003e (\n  \u003cDialog.Root\u003e\n    \u003cDialog.Trigger class={button.Root}\u003eOpen Dialog\u003c/Dialog.Trigger\u003e\n    \u003cPortal\u003e\n      \u003cDialog.Backdrop class={dialog.Backdrop} /\u003e\n      \u003cDialog.Positioner class={dialog.Positioner}\u003e\n        \u003cDialog.Content class={dialog.Content}\u003e\n          \u003cDialog.Title class={dialog.Title}\u003eSettings\u003c/Dialog.Title\u003e\n          \u003cDialog.Description class={dialog.Description}\u003eConfigure your preferences below.\u003c/Dialog.Description\u003e\n          \u003cDialog.CloseTrigger class={dialog.CloseTrigger}\u003e\n            \u003cXIcon /\u003e\n          \u003c/Dialog.CloseTrigger\u003e\n          \u003cdiv class={dialog.Body}\u003e\n            \u003cMenu.Root lazyMount unmountOnExit\u003e\n              \u003cMenu.Trigger class={styles.Trigger}\u003e\n                Select theme\n                \u003cMenu.Indicator class={styles.Indicator}\u003e\n                  \u003cChevronDownIcon /\u003e\n                \u003c/Menu.Indicator\u003e\n              \u003c/Menu.Trigger\u003e\n              \u003cPortal\u003e\n                \u003cMenu.Positioner\u003e\n                  \u003cMenu.Content class={styles.Content}\u003e\n                    \u003cMenu.Arrow class={styles.Arrow}\u003e\n                      \u003cMenu.ArrowTip class={styles.ArrowTip} /\u003e\n                    \u003c/Menu.Arrow\u003e\n                    \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"light\"\u003e\n                      Light\n                    \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n                    \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"dark\"\u003e\n                      Dark\n                    \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n                    \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"system\"\u003e\n                      System\n                    \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n                  \u003c/Menu.Content\u003e\n                \u003c/Menu.Positioner\u003e\n              \u003c/Portal\u003e\n            \u003c/Menu.Root\u003e\n          \u003c/div\u003e\n        \u003c/Dialog.Content\u003e\n      \u003c/Dialog.Positioner\u003e\n    \u003c/Portal\u003e\n  \u003c/Dialog.Root\u003e\n)\n\n```\n\n#### Vue\n\n```vue\n\u003cscript setup lang=\"ts\"\u003e\nimport { Dialog } from '@ark-ui/vue/dialog'\nimport { Menu } from '@ark-ui/vue/menu'\nimport { ChevronDownIcon, XIcon } from 'lucide-vue-next'\nimport { Teleport } from 'vue'\nimport button from 'styles/button.module.css'\nimport dialog from 'styles/dialog.module.css'\nimport styles from 'styles/menu.module.css'\n\u003c/script\u003e\n\n\u003ctemplate\u003e\n  \u003cDialog.Root\u003e\n    \u003cDialog.Trigger :class=\"button.Root\"\u003eOpen Dialog\u003c/Dialog.Trigger\u003e\n    \u003cTeleport to=\"body\"\u003e\n      \u003cDialog.Backdrop :class=\"dialog.Backdrop\" /\u003e\n      \u003cDialog.Positioner :class=\"dialog.Positioner\"\u003e\n        \u003cDialog.Content :class=\"dialog.Content\"\u003e\n          \u003cDialog.Title :class=\"dialog.Title\"\u003eSettings\u003c/Dialog.Title\u003e\n          \u003cDialog.Description :class=\"dialog.Description\"\u003eConfigure your preferences below.\u003c/Dialog.Description\u003e\n          \u003cDialog.CloseTrigger :class=\"dialog.CloseTrigger\"\u003e\n            \u003cXIcon /\u003e\n          \u003c/Dialog.CloseTrigger\u003e\n          \u003cdiv :class=\"dialog.Body\"\u003e\n            \u003cMenu.Root lazy-mount unmount-on-exit\u003e\n              \u003cMenu.Trigger :class=\"styles.Trigger\"\u003e\n                Select theme\n                \u003cMenu.Indicator :class=\"styles.Indicator\"\u003e\n                  \u003cChevronDownIcon /\u003e\n                \u003c/Menu.Indicator\u003e\n              \u003c/Menu.Trigger\u003e\n              \u003cTeleport to=\"body\"\u003e\n                \u003cMenu.Positioner\u003e\n                  \u003cMenu.Content :class=\"styles.Content\"\u003e\n                    \u003cMenu.Arrow :class=\"styles.Arrow\"\u003e\n                      \u003cMenu.ArrowTip :class=\"styles.ArrowTip\" /\u003e\n                    \u003c/Menu.Arrow\u003e\n                    \u003cMenu.Item :class=\"styles.Item\" value=\"light\"\u003eLight\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n                    \u003cMenu.Item :class=\"styles.Item\" value=\"dark\"\u003eDark\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n                    \u003cMenu.Item :class=\"styles.Item\" value=\"system\"\u003eSystem\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n                  \u003c/Menu.Content\u003e\n                \u003c/Menu.Positioner\u003e\n              \u003c/Teleport\u003e\n            \u003c/Menu.Root\u003e\n          \u003c/div\u003e\n        \u003c/Dialog.Content\u003e\n      \u003c/Dialog.Positioner\u003e\n    \u003c/Teleport\u003e\n  \u003c/Dialog.Root\u003e\n\u003c/template\u003e\n\n```\n\n#### Svelte\n\n```svelte\n\u003cscript lang=\"ts\"\u003e\n  import { Dialog } from '@ark-ui/svelte/dialog'\n  import { Menu } from '@ark-ui/svelte/menu'\n  import { Portal } from '@ark-ui/svelte/portal'\n  import { ChevronDownIcon, XIcon } from 'lucide-svelte'\n  import button from 'styles/button.module.css'\n  import dialog from 'styles/dialog.module.css'\n  import styles from 'styles/menu.module.css'\n\u003c/script\u003e\n\n\u003cDialog.Root\u003e\n  \u003cDialog.Trigger class={button.Root}\u003eOpen Dialog\u003c/Dialog.Trigger\u003e\n  \u003cPortal\u003e\n    \u003cDialog.Backdrop class={dialog.Backdrop} /\u003e\n    \u003cDialog.Positioner class={dialog.Positioner}\u003e\n      \u003cDialog.Content class={dialog.Content}\u003e\n        \u003cDialog.Title class={dialog.Title}\u003eSettings\u003c/Dialog.Title\u003e\n        \u003cDialog.Description class={dialog.Description}\u003eConfigure your preferences below.\u003c/Dialog.Description\u003e\n        \u003cDialog.CloseTrigger class={dialog.CloseTrigger}\u003e\n          \u003cXIcon /\u003e\n        \u003c/Dialog.CloseTrigger\u003e\n        \u003cdiv class={dialog.Body}\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.Root lazyMount unmountOnExit\u003e\n            \u003cMenu.Trigger class={styles.Trigger}\u003e\n              Select theme\n              \u003cMenu.Indicator class={styles.Indicator}\u003e\n                \u003cChevronDownIcon /\u003e\n              \u003c/Menu.Indicator\u003e\n            \u003c/Menu.Trigger\u003e\n            \u003cPortal\u003e\n              \u003cMenu.Positioner\u003e\n                \u003cMenu.Content class={styles.Content}\u003e\n                  \u003cMenu.Arrow class={styles.Arrow}\u003e\n                    \u003cMenu.ArrowTip class={styles.ArrowTip} /\u003e\n                  \u003c/Menu.Arrow\u003e\n                  \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"light\"\u003eLight\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n                  \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"dark\"\u003eDark\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n                  \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"system\"\u003eSystem\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n                \u003c/Menu.Content\u003e\n              \u003c/Menu.Positioner\u003e\n            \u003c/Portal\u003e\n          \u003c/Menu.Root\u003e\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n      \u003c/Dialog.Content\u003e\n    \u003c/Dialog.Positioner\u003e\n  \u003c/Portal\u003e\n\u003c/Dialog.Root\u003e\n\n```\n\n### Menu Item Dialog\n\nOpen a confirmation dialog from a menu item. This pattern is useful for destructive actions like delete that require\nuser confirmation.\n\n**Example: menu-item-dialog**\n\n#### React\n\n```tsx\nimport { Dialog } from '@ark-ui/react/dialog'\nimport { Menu } from '@ark-ui/react/menu'\nimport { Portal } from '@ark-ui/react/portal'\nimport { ChevronDownIcon, XIcon } from 'lucide-react'\nimport { useState } from 'react'\nimport button from 'styles/button.module.css'\nimport dialog from 'styles/dialog.module.css'\nimport styles from 'styles/menu.module.css'\n\nexport const MenuItemDialog = () =\u003e {\n  const [dialogOpen, setDialogOpen] = useState(false)\n\n  return (\n    \u003c\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.Root\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Trigger className={styles.Trigger}\u003e\n          Actions\n          \u003cMenu.Indicator className={styles.Indicator}\u003e\n            \u003cChevronDownIcon /\u003e\n          \u003c/Menu.Indicator\u003e\n        \u003c/Menu.Trigger\u003e\n        \u003cPortal\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.Positioner\u003e\n            \u003cMenu.Content className={styles.Content}\u003e\n              \u003cMenu.Item className={styles.Item} value=\"edit\"\u003e\n                Edit\n              \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n              \u003cMenu.Item className={styles.Item} value=\"duplicate\"\u003e\n                Duplicate\n              \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n              \u003cMenu.Separator className={styles.Separator} /\u003e\n              \u003cMenu.Item className={styles.Item} value=\"delete\" onClick={() =\u003e setDialogOpen(true)}\u003e\n                Delete...\n              \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n            \u003c/Menu.Content\u003e\n          \u003c/Menu.Positioner\u003e\n        \u003c/Portal\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.Root\u003e\n\n      \u003cDialog.Root open={dialogOpen} onOpenChange={(e) =\u003e setDialogOpen(e.open)} role=\"alertdialog\"\u003e\n        \u003cPortal\u003e\n          \u003cDialog.Backdrop className={dialog.Backdrop} /\u003e\n          \u003cDialog.Positioner className={dialog.Positioner}\u003e\n            \u003cDialog.Content className={dialog.Content}\u003e\n              \u003cDialog.Title className={dialog.Title}\u003eConfirm Delete\u003c/Dialog.Title\u003e\n              \u003cDialog.Description className={dialog.Description}\u003e\n                Are you sure you want to delete this item? This action cannot be undone.\n              \u003c/Dialog.Description\u003e\n              \u003cDialog.CloseTrigger className={dialog.CloseTrigger}\u003e\n                \u003cXIcon /\u003e\n              \u003c/Dialog.CloseTrigger\u003e\n              \u003cdiv className={dialog.Actions}\u003e\n                \u003cbutton className={button.Root} onClick={() =\u003e setDialogOpen(false)}\u003e\n                  Cancel\n                \u003c/button\u003e\n                \u003cbutton className={button.Root} data-variant=\"solid\" onClick={() =\u003e setDialogOpen(false)}\u003e\n                  Delete\n                \u003c/button\u003e\n              \u003c/div\u003e\n            \u003c/Dialog.Content\u003e\n          \u003c/Dialog.Positioner\u003e\n        \u003c/Portal\u003e\n      \u003c/Dialog.Root\u003e\n    \u003c/\u003e\n  )\n}\n\n```\n\n#### Solid\n\n```tsx\nimport { Dialog } from '@ark-ui/solid/dialog'\nimport { Menu } from '@ark-ui/solid/menu'\nimport { ChevronDownIcon, XIcon } from 'lucide-solid'\nimport { createSignal } from 'solid-js'\nimport { Portal } from 'solid-js/web'\nimport button from 'styles/button.module.css'\nimport dialog from 'styles/dialog.module.css'\nimport styles from 'styles/menu.module.css'\n\nexport const MenuItemDialog = () =\u003e {\n  const [dialogOpen, setDialogOpen] = createSignal(false)\n\n  return (\n    \u003c\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.Root\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Trigger class={styles.Trigger}\u003e\n          Actions\n          \u003cMenu.Indicator class={styles.Indicator}\u003e\n            \u003cChevronDownIcon /\u003e\n          \u003c/Menu.Indicator\u003e\n        \u003c/Menu.Trigger\u003e\n        \u003cPortal\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.Positioner\u003e\n            \u003cMenu.Content class={styles.Content}\u003e\n              \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"edit\"\u003e\n                Edit\n              \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n              \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"duplicate\"\u003e\n                Duplicate\n              \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n              \u003cMenu.Separator class={styles.Separator} /\u003e\n              \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"delete\" onClick={() =\u003e setDialogOpen(true)}\u003e\n                Delete...\n              \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n            \u003c/Menu.Content\u003e\n          \u003c/Menu.Positioner\u003e\n        \u003c/Portal\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.Root\u003e\n\n      \u003cDialog.Root open={dialogOpen()} onOpenChange={(e) =\u003e setDialogOpen(e.open)} role=\"alertdialog\"\u003e\n        \u003cPortal\u003e\n          \u003cDialog.Backdrop class={dialog.Backdrop} /\u003e\n          \u003cDialog.Positioner class={dialog.Positioner}\u003e\n            \u003cDialog.Content class={dialog.Content}\u003e\n              \u003cDialog.Title class={dialog.Title}\u003eConfirm Delete\u003c/Dialog.Title\u003e\n              \u003cDialog.Description class={dialog.Description}\u003e\n                Are you sure you want to delete this item? This action cannot be undone.\n              \u003c/Dialog.Description\u003e\n              \u003cDialog.CloseTrigger class={dialog.CloseTrigger}\u003e\n                \u003cXIcon /\u003e\n              \u003c/Dialog.CloseTrigger\u003e\n              \u003cdiv class={dialog.Actions}\u003e\n                \u003cbutton class={button.Root} onClick={() =\u003e setDialogOpen(false)}\u003e\n                  Cancel\n                \u003c/button\u003e\n                \u003cbutton class={button.Root} data-variant=\"solid\" onClick={() =\u003e setDialogOpen(false)}\u003e\n                  Delete\n                \u003c/button\u003e\n              \u003c/div\u003e\n            \u003c/Dialog.Content\u003e\n          \u003c/Dialog.Positioner\u003e\n        \u003c/Portal\u003e\n      \u003c/Dialog.Root\u003e\n    \u003c/\u003e\n  )\n}\n\n```\n\n#### Vue\n\n```vue\n\u003cscript setup lang=\"ts\"\u003e\nimport { Dialog } from '@ark-ui/vue/dialog'\nimport { Menu } from '@ark-ui/vue/menu'\nimport { ChevronDownIcon, XIcon } from 'lucide-vue-next'\nimport { ref, Teleport } from 'vue'\nimport button from 'styles/button.module.css'\nimport dialog from 'styles/dialog.module.css'\nimport styles from 'styles/menu.module.css'\n\nconst dialogOpen = ref(false)\n\u003c/script\u003e\n\n\u003ctemplate\u003e\n  \u003cMenu.Root\u003e\n    \u003cMenu.Trigger :class=\"styles.Trigger\"\u003e\n      Actions\n      \u003cMenu.Indicator :class=\"styles.Indicator\"\u003e\n        \u003cChevronDownIcon /\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.Indicator\u003e\n    \u003c/Menu.Trigger\u003e\n    \u003cTeleport to=\"body\"\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.Positioner\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Content :class=\"styles.Content\"\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.Item :class=\"styles.Item\" value=\"edit\"\u003eEdit\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.Item :class=\"styles.Item\" value=\"duplicate\"\u003eDuplicate\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.Separator :class=\"styles.Separator\" /\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.Item :class=\"styles.Item\" value=\"delete\" @click=\"dialogOpen = true\"\u003eDelete...\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n        \u003c/Menu.Content\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.Positioner\u003e\n    \u003c/Teleport\u003e\n  \u003c/Menu.Root\u003e\n\n  \u003cDialog.Root v-model:open=\"dialogOpen\" role=\"alertdialog\"\u003e\n    \u003cTeleport to=\"body\"\u003e\n      \u003cDialog.Backdrop :class=\"dialog.Backdrop\" /\u003e\n      \u003cDialog.Positioner :class=\"dialog.Positioner\"\u003e\n        \u003cDialog.Content :class=\"dialog.Content\"\u003e\n          \u003cDialog.Title :class=\"dialog.Title\"\u003eConfirm Delete\u003c/Dialog.Title\u003e\n          \u003cDialog.Description :class=\"dialog.Description\"\u003e\n            Are you sure you want to delete this item? This action cannot be undone.\n          \u003c/Dialog.Description\u003e\n          \u003cDialog.CloseTrigger :class=\"dialog.CloseTrigger\"\u003e\n            \u003cXIcon /\u003e\n          \u003c/Dialog.CloseTrigger\u003e\n          \u003cdiv :class=\"dialog.Actions\"\u003e\n            \u003cbutton :class=\"button.Root\" @click=\"dialogOpen = false\"\u003eCancel\u003c/button\u003e\n            \u003cbutton :class=\"button.Root\" data-variant=\"solid\" @click=\"dialogOpen = false\"\u003eDelete\u003c/button\u003e\n          \u003c/div\u003e\n        \u003c/Dialog.Content\u003e\n      \u003c/Dialog.Positioner\u003e\n    \u003c/Teleport\u003e\n  \u003c/Dialog.Root\u003e\n\u003c/template\u003e\n\n```\n\n#### Svelte\n\n```svelte\n\u003cscript lang=\"ts\"\u003e\n  import { Dialog } from '@ark-ui/svelte/dialog'\n  import { Menu } from '@ark-ui/svelte/menu'\n  import { Portal } from '@ark-ui/svelte/portal'\n  import { ChevronDownIcon, XIcon } from 'lucide-svelte'\n  import button from 'styles/button.module.css'\n  import dialog from 'styles/dialog.module.css'\n  import styles from 'styles/menu.module.css'\n\n  let dialogOpen = $state(false)\n\u003c/script\u003e\n\n\u003cMenu.Root\u003e\n  \u003cMenu.Trigger class={styles.Trigger}\u003e\n    Actions\n    \u003cMenu.Indicator class={styles.Indicator}\u003e\n      \u003cChevronDownIcon /\u003e\n    \u003c/Menu.Indicator\u003e\n  \u003c/Menu.Trigger\u003e\n  \u003cPortal\u003e\n    \u003cMenu.Positioner\u003e\n      \u003cMenu.Content class={styles.Content}\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"edit\"\u003eEdit\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"duplicate\"\u003eDuplicate\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Separator class={styles.Separator} /\u003e\n        \u003cMenu.Item class={styles.Item} value=\"delete\" onclick={() =\u003e (dialogOpen = true)}\u003eDelete...\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.Content\u003e\n    \u003c/Menu.Positioner\u003e\n  \u003c/Portal\u003e\n\u003c/Menu.Root\u003e\n\n\u003cDialog.Root bind:open={dialogOpen} role=\"alertdialog\"\u003e\n  \u003cPortal\u003e\n    \u003cDialog.Backdrop class={dialog.Backdrop} /\u003e\n    \u003cDialog.Positioner class={dialog.Positioner}\u003e\n      \u003cDialog.Content class={dialog.Content}\u003e\n        \u003cDialog.Title class={dialog.Title}\u003eConfirm Delete\u003c/Dialog.Title\u003e\n        \u003cDialog.Description class={dialog.Description}\u003e\n          Are you sure you want to delete this item? This action cannot be undone.\n        \u003c/Dialog.Description\u003e\n        \u003cDialog.CloseTrigger class={dialog.CloseTrigger}\u003e\n          \u003cXIcon /\u003e\n        \u003c/Dialog.CloseTrigger\u003e\n        \u003cdiv class={dialog.Actions}\u003e\n          \u003cbutton class={button.Root} onclick={() =\u003e (dialogOpen = false)}\u003eCancel\u003c/button\u003e\n          \u003cbutton class={button.Root} data-variant=\"solid\" onclick={() =\u003e (dialogOpen = false)}\u003eDelete\u003c/button\u003e\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n      \u003c/Dialog.Content\u003e\n    \u003c/Dialog.Positioner\u003e\n  \u003c/Portal\u003e\n\u003c/Dialog.Root\u003e\n\n```\n\n## Guides\n\n### Custom IDs\n\nArk UI autogenerates ids for menu items internally. Passing a custom `id` prop breaks the internal `getElementById`\nfunctionality used by the component.\n\n```tsx\n// ❌ Don't do this\n\u003cMenu.Item id=\"custom-id\" value=\"custom-value\"\u003e\n  Custom Item\n\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n\n// ✅ Do this\n\u003cMenu.Item value=\"custom-value\"\u003e\n  Custom Item\n\u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n```\n\n### Links\n\nTo render a menu item as a link, render the link as the menu item itself using the `asChild` prop, not as a child of the\nmenu item.\n\n\u003e This pattern ensures the link element receives the correct ARIA attributes and keyboard interactions from the menu\n\u003e item.\n\nHere's an example of a reusable `MenuItemLink` component:\n\n```tsx\ninterface MenuItemLinkProps extends Menu.ItemProps {\n  href?: string\n  target?: string\n}\n\nexport const MenuItemLink = (props: MenuItemLinkProps) =\u003e {\n  const { href, target, children, ...rest } = props\n  return (\n    \u003cMenu.Item {...rest} asChild\u003e\n      \u003ca href={href} target={target}\u003e\n        {children}\n      \u003c/a\u003e\n    \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n  )\n}\n```\n\n## API Reference\n\n### Props\n\n**Component API Reference**\n\n#### React\n\n**Root Props:**\n\n| Prop | Type | Required | Description |\n|------|------|----------|-------------|\n| `anchorPoint` | `Point` | No | The positioning point for the menu. Can be set by the context menu trigger or the button trigger. |\n| `aria-label` | `string` | No | The accessibility label for the menu |\n| `closeOnSelect` | `boolean` | No | Whether to close the menu when an option is selected |\n| `composite` | `boolean` | No | Whether the menu is a composed with other composite widgets like a combobox or tabs |\n| `defaultHighlightedValue` | `string` | No | The initial highlighted value of the menu item when rendered.\nUse when you don't need to control the highlighted value of the menu item. |\n| `defaultOpen` | `boolean` | No | The initial open state of the menu when rendered.\nUse when you don't need to control the open state of the menu. |\n| `highlightedValue` | `string` | No | The controlled highlighted value of the menu item. |\n| `id` | `string` | No | The unique identifier of the machine. |\n| `ids` | `Partial\u003c{\n  trigger: string\n  contextTrigger: string\n  content: string\n  groupLabel: (id: string) =\u003e string\n  group: (id: string) =\u003e string\n  positioner: string\n  arrow: string\n}\u003e` | No | The ids of the elements in the menu. Useful for composition. |\n| `immediate` | `boolean` | No | Whether to synchronize the present change immediately or defer it to the next frame |\n| `lazyMount` | `boolean` | No | Whether to enable lazy mounting |\n| `loopFocus` | `boolean` | No | Whether to loop the keyboard navigation. |\n| `navigate` | `(details: NavigateDetails) =\u003e void` | No | Function to navigate to the selected item if it's an anchor element |\n| `onEscapeKeyDown` | `(event: KeyboardEvent) =\u003e void` | No | Function called when the escape key is pressed |\n| `onExitComplete` | `VoidFunction` | No | Function {\n  display: inline-flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: center;\n  gap: 0.25rem;\n  padding-inline: 1rem;\n  padding-block: 0.5rem;\n  font-size: 0.875rem;\n  font-weight: 500;\n  font-family: inherit;\n  line-height: 1.25rem;\n  border-radius: 0.375rem;\n\n  user-select: none;\n  white-space: nowrap;\n  transition:\n    background 150ms,\n    border-color 150ms,\n    color 150ms;\n\n  background: transparent;\n  border: 1px solid var(--demo-border-emphasized);\n  color: var(--demo-neutral-fg);\n\n  \u0026:is(:hover, [data-state='open']):not(:disabled, [data-disabled]) {\n    background: var(--demo-neutral-subtle);\n  }\n\n  \u0026:focus-visible {\n    outline: 2px solid var(--demo-coral-focus-ring);\n    outline-offset: -1px;\n  }\n\n  \u0026:is(:disabled, [data-disabled]) {\n    opacity: 0.5;\n    filter: grayscale(100%);\n  }\n}\n\n.Indicator {\n  display: inline-flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: center;\n\n  \u0026 svg {\n    width: 1rem;\n    height: 1rem;\n  }\n}\n\n.ContextTrigger {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: center;\n  width: 15rem;\n  height: 12rem;\n  font-size: 0.875rem;\n  border: 1px dashed var(--demo-border-emphasized);\n  border-radius: 0.375rem;\n  user-select: none;\n}\n\n.Content {\n  --arrow-size: 10px;\n  position: relative;\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n  padding: 0.25rem;\n  min-width: max(var(--reference-width), 10rem);\n  max-height: min(var(--available-height, 300px), 300px);\n  background: var(--demo-bg-popover);\n  border: 1px solid var(--demo-border-emphasized);\n  border-radius: 0.375rem;\n  box-shadow: var(--demo-shadow-md);\n  z-index: calc(var(--demo-popover-z-index) + var(--layer-index, 0));\n  outline: none;\n  transform-origin: var(--transform-origin);\n\n  \u0026[data-state='open'] {\n    animation: scale-fade-in 0.15s ease-out;\n  }\n\n  \u0026[data-state='closed'] {\n    animation: scale-fade-out 0.1s ease-in;\n  }\n}\n\n.Arrow {\n  --arrow-background: var(--demo-bg-popover);\n  --arrow-shadow-color: var(--demo-border-emphasized);\n  z-index: -1;\n}\n\n.ArrowTip {\n  border-top: 1px solid var(--demo-border-emphasized);\n  border-left: 1px solid var(--demo-border-emphasized);\n}\n\n.ItemGroup {\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n\n  \u0026 + \u0026 {\n    margin-top: 0.5rem;\n  }\n}\n\n.ItemGroupLabel {\n  padding: 0.375rem 0.5rem;\n  font-size: 0.75rem;\n  font-weight: 600;\n  color: var(--demo-neutral-emphasized);\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n  letter-spacing: 0.025em;\n}\n\n.Item {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 0.5rem;\n  min-height: 2rem;\n  padding-inline: 0.725rem;\n  font-size: 0.875rem;\n  line-height: 1.25rem;\n  border-radius: 0.25rem;\n\n  user-select: none;\n  outline: none;\n  color: var(--demo-neutral-fg);\n  text-decoration: none;\n\n  \u0026[data-highlighted] {\n    background: var(--demo-neutral-subtle);\n  }\n\n  \u0026[data-disabled] {\n    color: var(--demo-neutral-emphasized);\n\n    opacity: 0.5;\n  }\n}\n\n.TriggerItem {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: space-between;\n  gap: 0.5rem;\n  padding: 0.5rem;\n  font-size: 0.875rem;\n  line-height: 1.25rem;\n  border-radius: 0.25rem;\n\n  user-select: none;\n  outline: none;\n\n  \u0026[data-highlighted] {\n    background: var(--demo-neutral-subtle);\n  }\n\n  \u0026::after {\n    content: '›';\n    font-size: 1rem;\n    color: var(--demo-neutral-emphasized);\n  }\n}\n\n.CheckboxItem,\n.RadioItem {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 0.5rem;\n  padding: 0.5rem;\n  font-size: 0.875rem;\n  line-height: 1.25rem;\n  border-radius: 0.25rem;\n\n  user-select: none;\n  outline: none;\n\n  \u0026[data-highlighted] {\n    background: var(--demo-neutral-subtle);\n  }\n\n  \u0026[data-state='checked'] {\n    color: var(--demo-coral-fg);\n  }\n\n  \u0026[data-disabled] {\n    color: \u0026[data-state='closed'] {\n    animation: fade-out 0.1s ease-in;\n  }\n}\n\n.Positioner {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: center;\n  position: fixed;\n  inset: 0;\n max-width: calc(100vw - 2rem);\n  max-height: calc(100vh - 2rem);\n  padding: var(--px);\n  border-radius: 8px;\n  border: 1px solid var(--demo-border);\n  background: var(--demo-bg-popover);\n var(--nested-layer-count) * 0.05));\n  }\n\n  \u0026[data-state='open'] {\n    animation: scale-fade-in 0.15s ease-out;\n  }\n\n  \u0026[data-state='closed'] {\n    animation: scale-fade-out 0.1s ease-in;\n  }\n}\n\n.Title {\n  margin: 0;\n  font-size: 1.125rem;\n  font-weight: 600;\n  line-height: 1.75rem;\n  color: var(--demo-neutral-fg);\n}\n\n.Description {\n  margin: 0.25rem 0 0;\n  font-size: 0.875rem;\n  line-height: 1.5;\n  color: var(--demo-neutral-fg-muted);\n}\n\n.Body {\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n  align-items: flex-start;\n  width: 100%;\n  gap: 0.75rem;\n  margin-top: 1.25rem;\n}\n\n.CloseTrigger {\n  display: inline-flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: center;\n  position: absolute;\n  top: 0.75rem;\n  right: 0.75rem;\n  width: 1.75rem;\n  height: 1.75rem;\n  padding: 0;\n  border: none;\n  border-radius: 4px;\n  background: transparent;\n  color: var(--demo-neutral-emphasized);\n\n  transition: background-color 0.15s ease;\n\n  \u0026 svg {\n    width: 1rem;\n    height: 1rem;\n  }\n\n  \u0026:hover {\n    background: var(--demo-neutral-muted);\n  }\n\n  \u0026:focus-visible {\n    outline: 2px solid font-weight: 600;\n    color: var(--demo-neutral-fg);\n  }\n\n  \u0026 p {\n    margin: 0;\n    font-size: 0.875rem;\n    line-height: 1.5;\n    color: var(--demo-neutral-fg-muted);\n  }\n}\n\n/*    \u003cMenu.Indicator className={styles.Indicator}\u003e\n            \u003cChevronDownIcon /\u003e\n          \u003c/Menu.Indicator\u003e\n        \u003c/Menu.Trigger\u003e\n        \u003cPortal\u003e\n          \u003cMenu.Positioner\u003e\n            \u003cMenu.Content className={styles.Content}\u003e\n              \u003cMenu.Item className={styles.Item} value=\"edit\"\u003e\n \u003c/Menu.Item\u003e\n              \u003cMenu.Separator className={styles.Separator} /\u003e\n              \u003cMenu.Item className={styles.Item} value=\"delete\" onClick={() =\u003e \u003c/Portal\u003e\n      \u003c/Menu.Root\u003e\n\n      \u003cDialog.Root open={dialogOpen} onOpenChange={(e) =\u003e setDialogOpen(e.open)} role=\"alertdialog\"\u003e\n        \u003cPortal\u003e\n        \u003c/Dialog.CloseTrigger\u003e\n              \u003cdiv className={dialog.Actions}\u003e\n                \u003cbutton className={button.Root} onClick={() =\u003e setDialogOpen(false)}\u003e\n                  Delete\n                \u003c/button\u003e\n              \u003c/div\u003e\n            \u003c/Dialog.Content\u003e\n )\n}\n"])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,"11c:T7c3,"])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,".Root {\n  display: inline-flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: center;\n  gap: background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);\n  z-index: calc(var(--demo-popover-z-index) + var(--layer-index, 0));\n\n  \u0026[data-state='open'] {\n    animation: fade-in 0.15s ease-out;\n  }\n\n  \u0026[data-state='closed'] {\n    animation: fade-out 0.1s ease-in;\n  }\n}\n\n.Positioner {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: center;\n  position: fixed;\n  inset: 0;\n  z-index: calc(var(--demo-popover-z-index) + var(--layer-index, 0));\n  /* Prevent overscroll bounce on iOS */\n  overscroll-behavior-y: none;\n  /* Reserve space for scrollbar to prevent layout shift */\n  scrollbar-gutter: stable both-edges;\n}\n\n.Content {\n  --px: 1.5rem;\n\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n  align-items: flex-start;\n  position: relative;\n  width: 24rem;\n  max-width: calc(100vw - 2rem);\n  max-height: calc(100vh - 2rem);\n  padding: var(--px);\n  border-radius: 8px;\n  border: 1px solid var(--demo-border);\n  background: var(--demo-bg-popover);\n  box-shadow: var(--demo-shadow-xl);\n  z-index: calc(var(--demo-popover-z-index) + var(--layer-index, 0));\n  outline: 0;\n  transition: transform 0.1s ease-in-out;\n  /* Offset for scrollbar width when body scroll is locked (prevents visual shift) */\n  translate: calc(-1 * var(--scrollbar-width, 0px) / 2) 0;\n\n  \u0026[data-has-nested] {\n    transform: scale(calc(1 - var(--nested-layer-count) * 0.05));\n  }\n\n  \u0026[data-state='open'] {\n    animation: scale-fade-in 0.15s ease-out;\n  }\n\n  \u0026[data-state='closed'] {\n    animation: scale-fade-out 0.1s ease-in;\n  }\n}\n\n.Title {\n  margin: 0;\n  font-size: 1.125rem;\n  font-weight: 600;\n  line-height: 1.75rem;\n  color: var(--demo-neutral-fg);\n}\n\n.Description {\n  margin: 0.25rem 0 0;\n  font-size: 0.875rem;\n  line-height: 1.5;\n  color: var(--demo-neutral-fg-muted);\n}\n\n.Body {\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n  align-items: flex-start;\n  width: 100%;\n  gap: 0.75rem;\n  margin-top: 1.25rem;\n}\n\n.CloseTrigger {\n  display: inline-flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: center;\n  position: absolute;\n  top: 0.75rem;\n  right: 0.75rem;\n  width: 1.75rem;\n  height: 1.75rem;\n  padding: 0;\n  border: none;\n  border-radius: 4px;\n  background: transparent;\n  color: var(--demo-neutral-emphasized);\n\n  transition: background-color 0.15s ease;\n\n  \u0026 svg {\n    width: 1rem;\n    height: 1rem;\n  }\n\n  \u0026:hover {\n    background: var(--demo-neutral-muted);\n  }\n\n  \u0026:focus-visible {\n    outline: 2px solid var(--demo-coral-focus-ring);\n    outline-offset: -1px;\n  }\n}\n\n.Actions {\n  display: flex;\n  justify-content: flex-end;\n  gap: 0.75rem;\n  margin-top: 1.5rem;\n}\n\n/* Scroll styles for dialog scroll examples */\n\n.ScrollContainer {\n  flex: 1;\n  min-height: 0;\n  margin: 1rem calc(-1 * var(--px)) 0;\n  padding: 0 var(--px);\n  overflow-y: auto;\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n  gap: 1rem;\n\n  /* Custom scrollbar */\n  scrollbar-width: thin;\n  scrollbar-color: var(--demo-neutral-solid) transparent;\n\n  \u0026::-webkit-scrollbar {\n    width: 8px;\n    height: 8px;\n  }\n\n  \u0026::-webkit-scrollbar-track {\n    background: transparent;\n  }\n\n  \u0026::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {\n    background-color: var(--demo-neutral-solid);\n    border-radius: 4px;\n\n    \u0026:hover {\n      background-color: var(--demo-neutral-emphasized);\n    }\n  }\n}\n\n.ScrollSection {\n  \u0026 h3 {\n    margin: 0 0 0.25rem;\n    font-size: 0.875rem;\n    font-weight: 600;\n    color: var(--demo-neutral-fg);\n  }\n\n  \u0026 p {\n    margin: 0;\n    font-size: 0.875rem;\n    line-height: 1.5;\n    color: var(--demo-neutral-fg-muted);\n  }\n}\n\n/* Outside scroll positioner variant */\n\n.OutsideScrollPositioner {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: flex-start;\n  justify-content: center;\n  position: fixed;\n  inset: 0;\n  z-index: calc(var(--demo-popover-z-index) + var(--layer-index, 0));\n  overflow-y: auto;\n  overscroll-behavior-y: contain;\n  pointer-events: auto;\n}\n\n@keyframes fade-in {\n  from {\n    opacity: 0;\n  }\n  to {\n    opacity: 1;\n  }\n}\n\n@keyframes fade-out {\n  from {\n    opacity: 1;\n  }\n  to {\n    opacity: 0;\n  }\n}\n\n@keyframes scale-fade-in {\n  from {\n    opacity: 0;\n    transform: scale(0.95);\n  }\n  to {\n    opacity: 1;\n    transform: scale(1);\n  }\n}\n\n@keyframes scale-fade-out {\n  from {\n    opacity: 1;\n    transform: scale(1);\n  }\n  to {\n    opacity: 0;\n \u0026[data-disabled] {\n    color: var(--demo-neutral-emphasized);\n\n    opacity: 0.5;\n  }\n}\n\n.TriggerItem {\n  display: flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  justify-content: space-between;\n  gap:
